name: Counter-Strike 2
description: For over two decades, Counter-Strike has offered an elite competitive experience, one shaped by millions of players from across the globe. And now the next chapter in the CS story is about to begin. This is Counter-Strike 2.

name: Unbound
description: Help Mox break out from his unjust inprisonment. Navigate through a hazardous, futuristic city and outrun your pursuer to reach an off-world colony in this 2D precision-platformer!

name: Encore!
description: Begin your career at the Multiversal Institute for the Rhythmic Arts (MIRA), an interdimensional school where music, magic, and friendship collide.  Encore! is a rhythm game and visual novel hybrid, where you must curate a band from wacky characters to win Battle of the Bands!

name: Super-B
description: Super-B is a free-to-play multiplayer game with AAA 3D graphics, where players become toy characters in a brick-built world. It features 12+ game modes at launch, offering fast-paced action and social interaction.

name: Escape Game: Camper 2
description: An escape game set inside a camper trailer. Search for items, gather clues, solve puzzles, and find your way out in this short, casual experience.

name: The Dead Roam Free - Episode 1
description: Follow Bob Segatti — private eye, local fixer, and newly turned zombie — in his biggest case yet. A film-noir tale of treachery, revenge, and pixel-splattered mayhem. It’s Snake with guns, dames, and a whole lot of brains to eat.

name: 涩涩发抖
description: A horror puzzle exploration game After breaking the lipstick, your wife began to beat you up Explore the house, collect props, avoid the wife who is in a strange state, and finally escape from this white nightmare

name: Wuthering Waves
notes: Beautiful anime open-world game, but feels hollow after you’ve explored it all
description: Wuthering Waves is a story-rich open-world action RPG with a high degree of freedom. You wake from your slumber as Rover, joined by a vibrant cast of Resonators on a journey to reclaim your lost memories and change the world.

name: 異ノ故リ-Isolated Hours-
description: A 3D horror game where your only goal is to finish your work… and survive the night. Unnatural anomalies creep into the office as you complete your tasks. Can you make it to the end of your shift alive.

name: REAL MOON
description: Explore a precisely recreated lunar surface built from real data and a JAXA-backed simulation.

name: Where Winds Meet
description: Where Winds Meet is an epic Wuxia open-world action-adventure RPG set in ancient China at the tenth century. Players will assume the role of a young sword master as they embark on a journey to uncover the mysteries of their own identity. Let the wind carry your legend on an epic journey to the East!

name: bygone snow
description: When the world ends, who will you spend your final hours with? A visual novel for the GBA.

name: The Ice Cream Culprit
description: Let your girlfriend know (or not) about the culprit who ate her ice cream.

name: Truck Company
description: TruckCompany - is a strategic game in which you develop your transport enterprise, the aim of which is to create a great consortium with other players and compete with others for the title of the best businessmen

name: Letherfall
description: Letherfall is a first-person horror video game with Lovecraftian elements: the player must make their way through monstrous entities and intricate puzzles while exploring the abandoned village of Letherfall. Some nightmares don’t fade. They’re just waiting for you to open the wrong door.

name: Dumbubu
description: You will own nothing and be happy. You can't afford a house, but you can afford Dumbubu Desktop Pet. Torture your Dumbubu and earn random Blind Boxes.

name: Dave's Wrecking Yard 3D
description: It's the late 1990s all over again and you find yourself the owner of Dave's Wrecking Yard. Earn cash by filling various parts orders by phone, internet, & walk-in customers. New engine rebuilding shop will keep you busy, but enjoy working at your own pace while ordering pizzas and chugging sodas.

name: Love Limit
description: Your blind date invades Earth!?

name: Mobile Murder Mystery
notes: Only read the game and choose the ending.
description: Follow the story of the Unseen Narrator, whose repetitive life falls apart when their co-worker decides to quit on a whim.

name: emerald
description: what do you fear?

name: In Our Parlor
description: In Our Parlor is a short, horror walking simulator. The player must make their way through a mysterious manor to unfold the story, find the parlor, and escape this nightmare. Navigate a series of dark set pieces and follow the music to discover the path forward.

name: Soulcrossed
description: A visual novel with SRPG battles that will test both your mind and heart.

name: PoligonVR
description: Imagine a virtual world where you can create or be anything you ever wanted. PoligonVR is a powerful community driven sandbox where we give you the necessary tools to turn your dreams into virtual reality.

name: Dota Underlords
description: Hire a crew and destroy your rivals in this new strategy battler set in the world of Dota. Introducing Season One: Explore White Spire and earn rewards on the Battle Pass. Pick from several different game modes, play on your own or with friends, and take advantage of crossplay on PC and mobile.

name: Dota 2
description: Every day, millions of players worldwide enter battle as one of over a hundred Dota heroes. And no matter if it's their 10th hour of play or 1,000th, there's always something new to discover. With regular updates that ensure a constant evolution of gameplay, features, and heroes, Dota 2 has taken on a life of its own.

name: Artifact
description: Artifact now features two games: Artifact Classic, the original Dota 2 trading card game, and Artifact Foundry, a special edition with streamlined gameplay, new cards, new single-player content, and an improved new player experience.

name: Alien Swarm
description: Co-operative multiplayer game and complete code base available for free.

name: Team Fortress 2
description: Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities. Constantly updated with new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats!

name: Death Drive
description: Death Drive is a road trip visual novel inspired by classic American Gothic fiction.

name: Shrouded Depths
description: Stranded in the fog of the murky waters on an isolated ferry with nothing but your harpoon gun, you feel the overwhelming presence of something within the misty mangrove. Your vessel is stopped dead and it is up to you with the assistance of the Captain to get the boat back up and running again.

name: Welcome To The Dark Place
description: The train is the only escape.

name: Sunday School
description: You are trapped in a Sunday School, plagued by eerie childlike hallucinations. Observe your surroundings carefully to spot anomalies, and descend deeper only when you’re certain it’s safe.

name: Yuki「清醒梦」
description: Explore an abandoned school where memories linger longer than the living. Uncover the mystery of your best friend’s disappearance. Dodge bullets.

name: FOR GOD'S SAKE, HELP HIM!
description: FOR GOD'S SAKE, HELP HIM! is a tiny, surreal first-person art "game" about what it's like. your goal is singular and simple: try to help him, however you can... if you can. that's a tall order considering you're both in a blank void and he's being crushed over and over.

name: Fear The Unknown - Dave Story
description: This story is one of the rare accounts we've managed to document a tale from the few who have encountered UFOs and lived to tell the tale. Dave considers himself lucky, and maybe you will be too, if you dare to face the unknown and survive.

name: Aker Fern 2
description: Take on the role of Dan Tern, a young man in whom the consciousness of Mikołaj Fern—a man from five hundred years ago—has awakened. Discover the mysteries of the past, confront the curse that haunts him, and conclude a story that never reached its end.

name: Goodbye
description: A story-driven interactive game about a sweet old lady and a mysterious figure. Follow her daily routine by completing a simple task list, until it’s time to make an unusual deal with the One Who’s Waiting. And please, do not say “goodbye.”

name: The Night Is Long
description: The Night Is Long is a short first-person horror game where a grieving man follows a ghostly vision into an abandoned mansion. Uncover dark secrets, survive atmospheric horrors, and face your past through exploration, puzzles, and subtle scares.

name: BIRDHOUSE
description: A short narrative-driven horror game made in RPGmaker featuring hand-drawn graphics and animated cutscenes. Players navigate the house and its backyard, interacting with the environment and collecting key items to progress the story.

name: You And I
description: "You And I” is an interactive film where you guide Mark, lost deep in the woods with his friend, Ace. However the more time the two spend together, the stranger the two become.

name: Yes, No, Goodbye
description: Yes, No, Goodbye is a haunting word game where you play as an exorcist attempting to send off a spirit clinging to their old apartment. Unscramble the truth and seek out solace for the dead.

name: Road Trip to the End of the World
description: Road Trip to the End of the World is a visual novel about the death of a friendship. When Andy and her imaginary friend Fishy set off on a road trip to crash their ex-best friend’s wedding, will they know when to hit the brakes?

name: The Wind and the Wisp
description: A 3D adventure game about blowing into the microphone. Join the Wind, a non-corporeal petal breeze, and the Wisp, a little white ghost with a red ribbon, on their journey to repair a mysterious broken garden.

name: Stomach
description: STOMACH is a first-person survival horror cooking game located in a cruise ship with PS1 inspired graphics to capture that retro horror feeling. Your task is to read a food order, search for food ingredients, and make it back safely to the kitchen to cook your ingredients before time runs out.

name: The Man in the Park 2: The Second Man in the Park
description: It's been so long. You've tried to forget, however tonight you must walk through the park again. Now there are two men in the park. Will you help one, or both? Who will you trust?

name: Wanderness
description: Capture stunning moments with your trusty camera and immerse yourself in a soothing, zen-inspired world that calms your mind and eases anxiety.

name: Kimochii Classroom
description: Welcome to Kimochii Classroom! A slice-of-life visual novel with stunning visuals, a beautiful soundtrack, and an immersive story. Who will you meet first?

name: blank_01
description: eat, sleep, work, repeat.

name: boyfriend or cake??
description: alternatively: caring romantic partner or delicious confectionery dessert?

name: The Man in the Park
description: You see a man in the park on your walk home. Will you help him?

name: BETWEEN
description: "May you leave no regrets in this journey of life." 、 An independent game about death. Explore the past lives in an atmospheric graveyard.

name: Beneath The Cherry Trees
description: "There are bodies buried beneath the cherry trees!" A Japanese poetic literature "Beneath The Cherry Trees(1928)" by Motojirō Kajii starts from a shocking sentence. We made a short Visual Novel based on this story with Illustrator Kotori's watercolor works, beautiful photographs, and imposing musics.

name: ミガカミカガミ -reviver-
description: MIGAKAMIKAGAMI -reviver- is a Horror 2D Pixel art Adventure Escape game. The story is set in a rural hospital where a legend of divine abductions by a deity called "Migakami-sama" has been passed down. The protagonists, Mika and Nae, are caught up in the divine abduction.

name: Little Robot
description: Join me on my first game as an Indie Dev with this casual 15-minute exploration game where players navigate the backyard, as our favorite sad robot, collecting essential components to successfully return indoors!

name: Hold Me Still
notes: Translate from Korean -> English -> play game.
description: "Hold Me Still" is a point-and-click puzzle mystery game where you investigate your friend's disappearance by exploring their house, collecting clues, solving puzzles, and uncovering the truth.

name: Dependency Psychological Test
notes: Same as name of the game
description: A narrative-driven point-and-click game that explores dependent personality through interactive psychological testing. Make choices, build relationships, and discover how your behavior shapes your mental assessment.

name: Honkai Impact 3rd
description: Honkai Impact 3rd - Ultimate anime action made real! HD cel-shading, infinite combos, explosive feedback... Experience next-gen real-time action! An original tale told across media, immersive stage events, star-studded voice cast... Become part of the legend!

name: Dilemma: The Game
description: In this 2D, Point and Click, choose-your-own-adventure experience. You will pick a way to respond to dilemmas .Answer non-sensical thought questions and unearth what happens from your choices.

name: Biophobia
description: A woman is violated by a man. In a final act of rebellion to preserve her humanity, she takes control and opens her stomach. Unable to finish what she started she waits for you, and asks you not to look away.

name: Replicomica
description: A short, atmospheric experience set inside a handcrafted dream. You are a small, solitary citizen drifting through augmented memories. Boot up your LonelyOS and let the robots guide you.

name: Terminus
description: Paris, 1968. As the city sinks into social unrest, a far darker threat rises from deep underground. Charles Mercier, a former SOLDIER recruited by a secret organization, is sent into the METRO tunnels to prevent an IMMINENT CATASTROPHE.

name: A Simple job
description: 💼 A simple task: Don’t press the red button. Sounds easy? 😏 Featuring an annoying voice, absurd endings, and too many achievements. Free. Pointless. Glorious. 🤡🔴

name: Project:M
description: Indie Horror puzzle game

name: The Falling Star
description: The Falling Star is a first-person exploration and narrative-driven walking simulator. Following the mother's last wish, the girl embarks on a journey in a dream to uncover the story of her missing aunt’s past.

name: Hollowing
description: Play as a student who is alone outside. He is constantly under academic and social pressure. As anxiety and loneliness accumulated, he began to notice something unusual. In this inescapable fear, he must find the answer... or be consumed by it.

name: Voice of the Ocean
description: Voice of the Ocean is a single-player adventure about a lost world, and the echoes of a forgotten past. Use your voice to sing ancient melodies and explore a world lost beneath the waves. Dive into the depths to uncover the power within your song and learn why you may be the last of your kind.

name: The River
description: A short story point-and-click visual novel about the afterlife.

name: Infinite Blue
description: Discover an immersive ocean Eco-Sim where you can be almost any animal under the sea! From a tiny seahorse to a massive blue whale, experience the endless circle of life in a massive world of reefs, shipwrecks, and hidden wonders.

name: Shelter from the Storm
description: Rain lashes down soaking you to the bone, you take shelter in a seemingly abandoned house. Navigate through the rooms solving puzzles and trying to escape in this short point & click adventure game.

name: Contraindication
description: Your end is my beginning. A short psychological visual novel with exploration and puzzle elements... it already lays shattered.

name: This is the last time
description: This is the Last Time is a minimalist first-person narrative game with a dark and heavy atmosphere.

name: Greed's Grub
description: You don’t remember exactly what you did, just that it had to have been real bad, if this was your punishment. Five days of community service in this greasy, rotting excuse for a burger joint. Just five days, and you’re free. That’s all you have to endure.

name: PEXIT 8
notes: loop in the hall with penguin
description: Penguin × Exit 8 : A unique combination Escape from the endlessly looping hallway. If you find an anomaly, choose YES PEN. If there is no anomaly, choose NO PEN. All anomalies contain penguin elements. Penguins are after you.

name: Banshee
description: The game is about escaping from a house where “Banshee”, a frightening looking fairy, wanders around, exploring the surroundings and using the items found to escape.

name: Half-Life 2 RTX
description: Re-live the groundbreaking, critically acclaimed Half-Life 2 like never before, reimagined with RTX Remix. Featuring full ray tracing, remastered assets, and DLSS 4 with Multi Frame Generation, this DLC is free for Half-Life 2 owners.

name: Black Reliquary
description: Black Reliquary is a challenging overhaul mod for Darkest Dungeon, one which makes sweeping changes to gameplay, adds a new story, a new setting, new narration, new music, new enemies, and so very much more. Embark into the distant east and uncover the ancient secrets of the Black Reliquary!

name: ReDo
description: A supernatural horror visual novel game where your choices decide if you and your friends see the light of day again or not. Use your sleuthing skills with point and click mechanics to battle horrifying creatures of the night that haunt an abandoned school building and earn your title of "Exorcist"!

name: PockeDate! - Pocket Dating Simulator
notes: My First video on my YouTube Channel :)
description: Your Pocket-Sized Dating Simulator! Every launch brings a new date with unique dialogues! Spend endless hours with your adorable, love-struck virtual girlfriend.

name: Kagura Survivors: Endless Night
description: Something is wrong in the Kaguraverse. An anomaly is creating tears in space-time and causing parallel worlds to converge! It falls upon Kagura-chan, the vessel of the Goddess's will, to get to the bottom of this crisis and return order to the various universes.

name: World of Warships
description: Immerse yourself in thrilling naval battles and assemble an armada of over 600 ships from the first half of the 20th century — from stealthy destroyers to gigantic battleships. Change the look of your ship, choose upgrades to suit your play style, and go into battle with other players!

name: Warframe
description: Awaken as an unstoppable warrior and battle alongside your friends in this story-driven free-to-play online action game

name: War Thunder
description: War Thunder is the most comprehensive free-to-play, cross-platform, MMO military game dedicated to aviation, armoured vehicles, and naval craft, from the early 20th century to the most advanced modern combat units. Join now and take part in major battles on land, in the air, and at sea.

name: Apex Legends™
description: Apex Legends is the award-winning, free-to-play Hero Shooter from Respawn Entertainment. Master an ever-growing roster of legendary characters with powerful abilities, and experience strategic squad play and innovative gameplay in the next evolution of Hero Shooter and Battle Royale.

name: Marvel Rivals
description: Marvel Rivals is a Super Hero Team-Based PVP Shooter! Assemble an all-star Marvel squad, devise countless strategies by combining powers to form unique Team-Up skills and fight in destructible, ever-changing battlefields across the continually evolving Marvel universe!

name: LoveCraft
description: Welcome to LoveCraft - home to interesting people, hot parties, exploration and fulfilling relationships! Create your world, from a unique persona to your exciting adventures.

name: MY HERO ULTRA RUMBLE
description: Pick your favorite character, team up and fight to be the last ones standing in the new 24-player Battle Royale free to play game "MY HERO ULTRA RUMBLE"!

name: 3on3 FreeStyle: Rebound
description: 3on3 FreeStyle: Rebound allows players to work with their teammates to pull off rim-shaking slam dunks, awe-inspiring alley-oops, flashy no-look passes, and clutch outside shots which breaks the heart of the opposing team in competitive games filled with the joy and energy of street basketball.

name: Crush Crush
description: Welcome to Crush Crush - the Idle Dating Sim! Meet, flirt, and fall in love with a motley cast of girls in this heartfelt and hilarious game.

name: Doki Doki Literature Club!
description: The Literature Club is full of cute girls! Will you write the way into their heart? This game is not suitable for children or those who are easily disturbed.

name: Conspiracy Girls
description: Conspiracy Girls is a short visual novel about cute and funny girls who around exposing conspiracies, and get into all sorts of trouble doing so!

name: SEXTS
description: Let's start typing!Discover gorgeous hentai women in this typing game!Play and unlock tons of pics of the most sublime waifus!!!

name: Banana
notes: Test your mouse with banana on the screen.
description: Banana is a clicker Game, in which you click a Banana! In Banana you click the Banana to gain even more Bananas! Every 3 hours, you get dropped a banana. Each banana is also made by the community in discord. Come hang out with us and let's grow into something awesome !

name: Kokurase Episode 1
description: The Kokurase gang, also known as Cupid’s Helpers, is out to help freshman Sakura woo Yoshimitsu, a popular senior with every other girl in school vying for his heart. Switch between members to bring these two lovebirds together in an intertwining tale.

name: First Snow
description: Having moved away from her friends and family to attend community college, Allison Merlo is a fresh student struggling with the day to day challenges of life.

name: DEAD OR ALIVE 5 Last Round: Core Fighters
description: The free version of the final word in fighting entertainment - DEAD OR ALIVE 5 Last Round!

name: Cave Crawler
description: Cave Crawler is a short, 2D side-scrolling action platformer. Explore caves filled with interesting enemies and fun platforming challenges.

name: Narcissu 1st & 2nd
description: This is a story of disease and suffering; of medication and adverse effects; of thoracotomy scars and cellular poisons; of the living who cannot help but to die and of the dying who cannot help but to live; of a resting place other than "on 7F" or "at home".

name: Beat of Rebellion
description: Be the voice out of the choir! Beat of Rebellion is an isometric rhythm-based Hack & Slash. Follow the Beat, create your own Melodies and unleash devastating combos to fight against a totalitarian regime in a cyberpunk city.

name: Operation: Outbreak
description: Your squad's vehicle exploded during a patrol, and you're the only survivor. The enemy is unusual this time. A virus has turned the city into a warzone of the undead. Get to the exfil in time or die trying. A free-to-play short and intense FPS zombie survival horror game.

name: Modularity
description: Modularity is a resource management builder game where the player stitches together flesh and metal in creative ways to construct bigger and greater amalgamations.

name: Stories Adrift: Wake - Prologue
description: As the new owner of a book boat, you are entrusted with returning a single page of a book and embarks on a journey through a world both mysterious and familiar. By solving intricate puzzles and piecing together scattered clues, you uncover the truth of the world - and of yourself.

name: Path of the Tank
description: Can you challenge oblivion itself?

name: Lokko
description: Lokko is a bouncy, action-packed 3D platformer where YOU create the adventure! In Lokko, players race to deliver hot pizzas around the globe while battling the sinister Goobol fast-food corporation.

name: 12 Memory Lane
description: Explore the shifting manor of the enigmatic Henri Villemaine and uncover the truth behind his family’s sudden disappearance. Bend reality to recreate the scenes from his diary and expose long-buried secrets. What if your role in this case went beyond that of a simple investigator?

name: Fallout Shelter
description: Fallout Shelter puts you in control of a state-of-the-art underground Vault from Vault-Tec. Build the perfect Vault, keep your Dwellers happy, and protect them from the dangers of the Wasteland.

name: Brawlhalla
description: An epic platform fighter for up to 8 players online or local. Try casual free-for-alls, ranked matches, or invite friends to a private room. And it's free! Play cross-platform with millions of players on PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, iOS, Android & Steam! Frequent updates. Over sixty Legends.

name: Albion Online
description: Albion Online is a fantasy sandbox MMORPG featuring a player-driven economy, classless combat system, and intense PvP battles. Explore a vast open world full of danger and opportunity. Grow your wealth, forge alliances, and leave your mark on the world of Albion.

name: Bongo Cat
description: Bongo cat needs your help. Bongo cat needz more hatz!!! Every time you press a key, Bongo cat will punch your taskbar. Type, click, play, work to collect more points. Which hats will you find?

name: Supermarket Together
description: The multiplayer supermarket has arrived to your neighbourhood for free! Stock your shop space, unlock perks and franchises, hire employees or chase those pesky shoplifters. The more players, the more action!

name: Pixel Gun 3D: PC Edition
description: The legendary mobile multiplayer FPS Pixel Gun 3D comes to PC! Experience an enhanced world of colorful, blocky action. Featuring dozens of game modes and maps, 1500+ guns plus cross-platform multiplayer and progression.

name: Star Trek Online
description: In Star Trek Online, the Star Trek universe appears for the first time on a truly massive scale. Players take the captain's chair as they command their own starship and crew. Explore strange new worlds, seek out new life and new civilizations, and boldly go where no one has gone before.

name: Cell to Singularity - Evolution Never Ends
description: The epic story of evolution, technology, humanity, and dinosaurs is yours to tap.

name: Shakes and Fidget
description: Shakes & Fidget is a hilarious fantasy role-playing satire and at the same time, an award-winning RPG! Sounds crazy? With over 50 million enthusiastic players, it ranks among the most celebrated online role-playing games worldwide!

name: Trackmania
description: Trackmania – the unique racing game that combines precision and creativity. Play for free across five stunning environments, race on the best player-made tracks every week, and climb your regional rankings.

name: RISK: Global Domination
description: Take over the world in RISK: Global Domination, the iconic strategy board game with 100+ original and classic maps and millions of players

name: Starbrew Station
description: Start with one machine. Scale to a galaxy-supplying coffee empire. Hire 33 alien workers, survive Rush Hour chaos every 8 minutes, and boss-fight your way to prestige resets that unlock permanent upgrades. Free to play. No paywalls.

name: Low Poly Mouse Game
description: 2-4 Sneaky and squeaky low-poly mice face off against a lone cat in the battlefield of a human house. Mice use proximity chat to communicate with other players, while the cat hunts their noises. Will the mice perform enough tasks to destroy the house, or will the cat defeat enough mice to save it?

name: Jurassic Wrap
description: Rescue baby dino eggs in a family-friendly adventure made by a father & son duo. In Jurassic Wrap, your goal is simple: save the baby dino eggs and make it safely to the exit portal. Along the way you’ll leap, dodge, and use clever screen-wrapping mechanics to outsmart threats through each level.

name: Putrid Snow 2: House of Yule
description: Trapped alone in a mansion with relentless holiday monsters, you must scavenge for presents to find weapons and traps. Outsmart the AI, manage your inventory, and turn the holiday hunter into the hunted. Free to play!

name: MimiBird
description: MimiBird is a crafting exploration game set in a place full of colorful nature, where you must craft different tools after collecting various materials in order to capture birds and take them to your grandmother.

name: Gilroy's Grove
description: Step into the forest where your shovel is both your weapon and lifeline. Fight back against twisted forest creatures, claim their corrupted seeds, and bring them to your farm and grow your weapons. Restore the forest plant by plant, Will you break the curse, or will the forest claim you too?

name: MINOS: Home A-Labyrinth
description: A free MINOS spin-off inspired by everyone's favorite holiday film. Build festive traps, defend a snow-covered home from clumsy intruders, and unleash winter-grade mischief in this legally distinct seasonal homage.

name: Garganta
description: 'Garganta' is a 3D Platformer influenced by Tsutomu Nihei's works. Embody Servo, an android racing to neutralise a device that'll engulf the Universe in innumerable singularities. Encounter peculiar characters and unveil secret plots designed by an AI, maddened by incomprehensible horrors.

name: Love and Sex: First Base
description: Become roommates with two gorgeous girls and explore the largest free hand-drawn 18+ dating sim ever. Level up your stats, sharpen your game, and roam the city to seduce 5 unique waifus & find your soulmate(s). Play your cards right, and your days will be filled with nothing but love… and sex!

name: BrownDogGames
description: A low-poly universe of mini-games! Build, blast, defend, and duel across multiple worlds—all inside the BrownDogGames hub.

name: Dollemma
description: An asymmetrical multiplayer horror game with a unique appealing aesthetic. Join up to 4 friends and work together to escape the dollhouse! Or play as the Hunter and shatter the dolls before they can escape.

name: Undeads
description: Embark on a risky but exciting journey through the world of Undeads. Search for weapons, armor, supplies and medicine. Survive or hunt survivors. Enjoy unique matches, sell your loot, and fight bloody and challenging battles against the background of the zombie apocalypse!

name: Lantern Light (DEMO)
description: Lantern Light is an action horror puzzle game where you explore a decrepit manor and face twisted monsters. While clinging to the fragile glow of your lantern, the only thing keeping you from madness. Keep the light alive, preserve your sanity, and confront your deepest fears in Lantern Light.

name: The Menace Below
description: Short, challenging, hand-drawn cinematic platformer about escaping from the lair of evil ratmen.

name: Seoul Bridge
description: You are trapped on the Seoul Bridge. Whether you move toward the exit or return to the entrance, you remain trapped on the Seoul Bridge. Observe your surroundings carefully and find a way to escape.

name: Bound Between Desks
description: A mystical visual novel where ordinary school life intertwines with mysterious phenomena. Every decision you make could lead to uncovering secrets... or plunge you into even greater uncertainty.

name: Denpa Nightmares
description: No matter how long you’re gone, there will always be a girl waiting for you in the same place. This is a story about forgetting, and about waiting. After countless restarts and countless memories lost… how long will you stay with her this time?

name: BongBongCapy
description: The super cute capybara will stay with you. Every time you tap the keyboard or click the mouse, it'll mimic the same taps to accumulate merit points. Merit lets you randomly draw diverse looks to switch freely. Don't hesitate—add a super versatile capybara to your desktop now!

name: Drunk Driving Simulator
description: In Drunk Driving Simulator you drive down the highway while getting drunk, making driving more difficult as time goes on

name: Endless Forest
description: You find yourself in an unending forest, trees as far as the imagination can reach. How did you get here? Where even are you? At this point you are really only left with one option, chop trees and hone your senses as you venture through the mysterious forest.

name: The Backrooms Deluxe 2
description: A roguelite multiplayer Backrooms game that bases itself on The Backrooms Deluxe's levels and expands on the mechanics, levels, networking and enemy AI.

name: Cube Dodger 3D
description: Cube Dodger 3D is a fast, neon arcade runner. Slide along a glowing highway, dodge smarter and faster cubes, charge your shield, unlock ships, roads and enemy skins, and chase brutal score-based Steam achievements

name: THE SCREAM OF DARKNESS
description: the scream of darkness is a first person psychological horror with multiple endings, it shows the story about one guy that gets his whole life ruined in days. can you discover the truth?

name: Rogue Slots
description: A deckbuilding roguelike, with a slot machine as your Dungeon Master. Spin to strike in a roguelike where every action comes from your custom slot machine. Load the reels with weapons, coins, and cursed relics, then let fate take the reel. Collect Knobs and trade them with your friends.

name: Land Run
description: An original single-play card game set in the 'LandRun' of the Western Pioneering Era. A fierce psychological battle using cards and luck, the game is turned upside down with just one card.

name: Number Factory
description: Build the ultimate number production empire! Automate generators, unlock powerful upgrades, and prestige for permanent bonuses. Compete on global leaderboards and watch your numbers grow to infinity in this addictive idle incremental game.

name: Gravity Game
description: Gravity Game is a puzzle-style infinite physics simulation. You are tasked with escaping your home planet, and reaching the goal at another! This game uses real Newtonian Physics in a simple 2D simulation, as a way to help people visually understand the mechanics.

name: Samburger's oddballs
description: A block boomin, cannon blastin, heart grabbin combo! play games such as: Anncceleration: Collect hearts while you race against the clock in multiple levels! Athena's higher wire: Dodge cannons and collect stars for a high score! Boomin blocks: Line up combos in a puzzle shooter!

name: The Whittled Horse
description: A boy named Thomas and his friend Evey are trusted to deliver a package. Little do they know there is a force stalking them, and what they carry will decide the future.

name: Ear Training
description: A chill ear training game to help you get better at recognizing notes, chords, and intervals. Simple, useful, and made with love.

name: Journey to Shambhala
description: Embark on an epic quest in "Journey to Shambhala," a 3D Action-Adventure Hindi game that takes you deep beneath ancient temples in search of the mystical city of Shambhala. You must navigate through 5 challenging stages, each filled with obstacles to unveil the hidden pathway to the legendary city.

name: Elemental Battle: Eclipse
description: An anime-style arena fighter with elemental powers, unique characters, and combo-heavy combat. Built by a solo developer, featuring striking visuals, unique abilities, responsive controls, and fast local multiplayer battles packed with style and energy for all skill levels and endless replayability.

name: Heist Royale
description: Heist Royale is a chaotic multiplayer heist game where strategy, sabotage, and speed determine who escapes with the most cash! Race to rob a heavily secured bank, outsmart rivals, and dodge security—all while pulling off hilarious tricks and betrayals. Work together or backstab your way to victory!

name: Price of Obsession
description: Price of Obsession is a choice-driven narrative game featuring multiple endings, where your decisions determine who lives, who dies, and who you might fall in love with.

name: Hypercar Evolution 2025
description: The first-ever true MMO hypercar racing game is here! Play with up to 39 friends!

name: TCSTRIKERS5
description: This is the biggest news title of 2025. A cute bullet-hell shooter is now available. The game features cool and futuristic visuals and active gameplay.

name: Pingorile
description: A retro-style 2D platformer where you play as a penguin collecting yellow budgies to fulfill his dream of flying. Explore diverse levels, jump past obstacles, and enjoy a colorful, music-filled adventure.

name: Campoca
description: Enter Campoca, where feel-good activities and delightful interactions are yours to enjoy completely for free! Collect joyful memories and turn your campsite into a charming, heartwarming retreat!

name: Never Immortal
description: Never Immortal is a fast-paced topdown shooter playable solo or in online co-op. Survive the never-ending horde of zombies and bosses in Wave Survival gamemode, or face off against your friends in the Zombie Mystery gamemode.

name: Once Upon a Shell
description: Once Upon a Shell is a roguelike racing game of ridiculous speed and wild upgrades. As a tortoise, use your shell to your advantage and slide downhill to generate speed. Build movement combos between races and prove that even a tortoise can lift The Hare Cup.

name: Cybersoul
description: Deckbuilding Card Game meets Incremental Data Mining. Command 3+ dystopian factions & 500+ cards in this acid-soaked Cyberpunk Card Battler. Unleash glitch-fueled combos, gamble in a corrupted Arcade, and farm Souls & Star Power in idle clickers. Don't just play the game—break the code and ascend.

name: Inotia 4
description: The grand adventure of Kiyan, assassin of the Dark Clan, and Yusha, saint of light, begins across the vast continent of Inotia. Experience an emotional story and thrilling, action-packed combat!

name: Temple of the Green Moon: Prologue
description: You're alone. Darkness and hopelessness surround you. These creatures are everywhere. Can you save yourself, or is it all doomed?

name: Airship
description: Airship is a multiplayer game platform in early development! Play BedWars 2 and other indie games.

name: CivIdle
description: CivIdle is an idle/incremental game that allows you to lead your own civilization through thousands of years from ancient times to the modern era. Expand your territory, explore a vast tech tree, build various wonders, and trade with global players: empire must grow and numbers must go up!

name: Foobar Zero
description: Foobar Zero is a fast-paced multiplayer shooter game, with anime characters. Customize your characters with various outfits, create your own loadout with futuristic guns and swords, and dominate your enemies with superior movement!

name: Testimony of Shew: Depths of Sheol
description: Testimony of Shew is a narrative driven Third-person/Side-scroller platformer, based on a true story, told in symbolism. Traverse through a dark world filled with meaning. Master the art of dodging and perfect your timing as you face increasingly challenging obstacles.

name: Bane of Darkness
description: In Bohemia's shadows, hunt the Bane of Darkness. Explore, fight, and grow stronger on your quest to rescue your beloved from the wicked vampire lord.

name: Molili AI Friends: Your AI Desk Pal
description: Bring a charming AI friend to your desktop. Molili AI friend listens, reads by your side, blushes when you care, and helps with study or work using a smart personality system that remembers your moments, growing from curious visitor to the companion who understands you best.

name: Ordy: The Rise of Clara
description: Imagine a near-future world where the supernatural is the norm. People effortlessly levitate, communicate telepathically, and use telekinesis daily. You play as Clara, an "Ordy" who lost all her abilities in an accident. How do you navigate a world completely unsuited for ordinary people?

name: Monster Ops 13
description: FREE Season 2 Premiere of Monster Ops! Black Ops soldiers Wraith and Tide know the world is against them, and they can only rely on each other. Two soldiers, forced to go rogue, with a desperate mission. There's no one left they can trust. A NSFW Gay Visual Novel Romance Put out in Monthly Episodes!

name: Yuletide Regicide
description: A dead Santa Claus right before Christmas is never a good sign. Interrogate the North Pole suspects to solve the murder and figure out how to save the festive season in this short dark comedy visual novel whodunnit.

name: Piczle World of Puzzles
description: All your favourite logic-puzzles in one feature-rich package, Piczle World of Puzzles is the ultimate in picture logic-puzzling!

name: MindEscape
description: Step into immersive 3D escape rooms and reveal your true self. MindEscape uses cutting-edge AI and scientifically-backed gameplay to assess your personality, problem-solving style, and behavioral patterns—all while having fun

name: devasion 0.5
description: Devasion 0.5 – The Intergalactic Upgrade Adventure Steer your spaceship through dangerous galaxies, destroy colored rocks, and collect gadgets to upgrade your ship! Only those who master the right combinations of weapons, colors, and timing will progress.

name: Green Wave
description: Restore order to chaos in Green Wave, a not so serious traffic management game. Time your traffic lights perfectly to keep the city moving or watch it descend into bumper-to-bumper madness.

name: Killer Chat! - Original Edition
description: Killer Chat! is a satirical serial killer dating chatsim. Play as a (customisable!) writer as you pretend to be a serial killer, get inspiration for your book, fall in love and try not to call the cops through a whirlwind six months with your murderous beau of choice. What could possibly go wrong?

name: My Sexy Neighbour 2 | Prologue
description: Before the fame came the thrill. In this provocative prologue to My Sexy Neighbor 2, you take your first steps into a world of voyeurism, dares, and dirty cash. Sneak, stream, seduce — and discover how one wild night can change everything.

name: #Oyster Sooource 2120bb
description: Destruction is Pleasure! Idle, upgrade, and dodge enemies in a Pac-Man-style action game with allies and endless retries.

name: Janky Golf with Stream
description: A chaotic Twitch integrated mini golf game where your viewers control the shots. Design maps while Twitch chat aims, rotates, and swings using commands or the interactive extension.

name: Bard Idle
description: Build a unique team, where each character has a random weapon, race and class. Strong combinations of heroes, enhanced by the ballad creation system and jelly dwarfs, will capture your adventure in history!

name: United We Forge
description: Deep beneath the mountains lies a living forge, where rival creatures — Ogres, Goblins, and Amphibians — must set aside their grudges to craft powerful gear. In this competitive card strategy game, every card you play shapes the delicate balance between power and collaboration.

name: Tichupro by Spectrum
description: Enjoy Tichupro, inspired by the famous strategic card game! Play with real users from around the world!

name: WhoIs
description: A 4-8 player PvP game of deception and paranoia. You have a role, a target, and one mission: eliminate them and escape. Use powerful abilities at the risk of revealing your identity. In this ever-changing arena, hunt or be hunted.

name: Goober Dash
description: Goober Dash: A 2D platformer battle royale where Goobers Run, Jump & Dash to victory! Customize your Goober, dash to outmaneuver opponents, create your own levels, and compete in global time trials. Unlock exclusive skins and celebrate your wins in this action-packed multiplayer Race Royale!

name: Jackpot.de
description: Play our prize-winning slots in the best free2play funtime casino out there. The Las Vegas experience of a lifetime awaits you! We've got more than 200 of the best slots and jackpots you can find. You simply won't be able to resist! Our jackpot game offers you fun without end!

name: Money Simulator: Brokeville
description: Welcome to the Brokeville! Grind your way to the top through jobs, deliveries, bicycle races, and risky crypto trades. Buy, customize, and sell cars & motorcycles for profit. Build your own businesses, manage them, and hire staff to grow your empire.

name: Reign of Guilds
description: Reign of Guilds — the spiritual successor to the old-school fantasy where steel, magic, and skill decide your fate. Inspired by the legacy of Ultima Online and EverQuest.

name: Dilemma Dungeon
description: A co-op roguelike dungeon exploration game. As you progress with your teammates, you will face dilemma choices where growing stronger yourself means someone else becomes weaker. Each run, you must create builds by combining different maps, classes, skills, and items, and overcome the cursed dungeon.

name: Million Card Game
description: Compete with 1-5 players in this interactive cozy indie card game! Strategize table layouts and hand placement in order to be the first top win!

name: The Shadow of Shadows
description: Lilith is a young Shadow that wants to be a Light. She embarks on a journey to learn how Light is made but is about to find out a horrible secret. Will you help her turn the tides?

name: Top Heroes
description: ◆ Embark on an Adventure Explore unknown lands, unlock ancient ruins, and brave dangerous dungeons! ◆ Build Your Kingdom Create a thriving realm from scratch and turn your dream city into reality! ◆ Achieve Glory with Your Guild Form powerful alliances with players worldwide, and conquer the world!

name: Battle of Goldfish Scooping
description: "Battle of Goldfish Scooping" is an asymmetrical multiplayer action game. Players take on the roles of scoops and goldfish to aim for high scores. Based on your previous play results, you can acquire skills and enhance parameters to aim for even higher scores!

name: Republic of Jungle
description: Gather your friends (5 to 10 players) and play as advisors to President Puma. His re-election depends on your loyalty. In a social deduction party game, Leakers try to sneak into missions to leak Puma's secrets- Loyalists try to suss them out. Read the room and bluff your way to a political victory.

name: Stress Relief
description: Stress Relief is an idler game, which comes with a reliable companion, the Slime! Are you bored? Are you stressed because of work? Come and destroy your desktop with the tools included! Play, earn Pixel Points and get drops every 25 minutes!

name: Myrkwood: Offshoot
description: Myrkwood: Offshoot is a top-down survival defense game that you can play with friends! Defend the Gem as you fight through waves of enemies!

name: Slime Saga
description: Train slimes, make friends, and get set for adventure! It's time to pick up your slime catcher and become the latest and greatest tamer!

name: Rink Rascals
description: Dash, steal, and score with up to 6 players on an outdoor hockey rink. Choose your class, customize your gear, battle for the puck, and score epic goals in this fast-paced cartoon-style hockey game full of action.

name: HeXpunk
description: HexPunk is a co-op, third-person shooter with an emphasis on stylish and fast-paced combat.

name: Fall Asleep
description: Fall Asleep is a tense first-person climbing game where you’re trapped in a nightmare and the only way out is up. See only the platforms in front of you, make every jump count, and try to escape before the dream swallows you whole.

name: Sunflower Stronghold
description: Grow Crops, Process Resources and Construct Towers and Defend!

name: Little Smiles Daycare
description: A short psychological horror experience set inside an abandoned daycare. Explore, uncover hidden notes, solve eerie mysteries, and discover what happened to Little Smiles Daycare, before something finds you first.

name: Ktrl Smash
description: Ktrl Smash is a fast-paced multiplayer arena game where anything can become a weapon. Pick your fighter, grab bats, baseballs, or even chairs, collect stat boosts, and fight to get the most kills before time runs out. Stay alert, keep moving, and defeat as many players as you can.

name: 今夜无人入眠 No One Sleep Tonight
description: No One Sleep Tonight is a game that focuses on the feeling of Night. You will go through multiple midnight scenes and experience different environments and gameplay, explore this world created by street lamp, moonlight, and wind.

name: SurLeFil
description: On the Wire is an educational game mixing science, history and humor. Follow ProfFil’s lessons, help Kelhann complete his missions, and discover the wonders of electricity, mechanics, and more.

name: S.P.E.C.T.O.R 01
description: S.P.E.C.T.O.R 01 is a Third-Person SCI-FI action shooter. You are a soldier in the distant future on a solo rescue mission codenamed S.P.E.C.T.O.R 01. Aliens have taken over certain areas around earth and have taken one of your fellow soldiers hostage. Your task is to bring them to safety.

name: Fruit Fusion!
description: Help Aira, Rinka and Yuri merge fruit and unlock new cards in this sweet and charming Suika x Deckbuilder!

name: Hivefront TD
description: Collect your insect army and defend the hive as either Ants or Bees in this awesome tower defense adventure, brought to life with a hand-drawn art style!

name: Supercar Evolution 2025
description: The first-ever true MMO supercar racing game is here! Play with up to 39 friends!

name: SportsBlitz
description: SportsBlitz, a retro themed micro game collection of sports games.

name: Action PUZZLE
description: Clear as many lines as possible to earn a high score. Blocks will fall in response to your character's movements, so avoid them skillfully.

name: Skybound
description: Skybound is a 3D exploration platformer focused on fun, fluid movement mechanics, parkour and environmental puzzle solving.

name: SlimyLeap
description: SlimyLeap is a fast-paced pixel-art infinite runner where you play as a brave little slime trying to go as far as possible without dying.

name: Monstro Maestro
description: Play as a conductor trapped in a haunted and crazy mansion! As a concert begins, a jealous ghost appears and takes possession of your orchestra. To free them, you must explore every corner of the mansion, complete musical challenges, and rebuild your troupe.

name: The wild darkness
description: Explore a survival-roguelike RPG set in an unknown and bizarre world. To withstand its many dangers, you'll need to gain new knowledge, scavenge for food, and acquire useful items. Craft, build, and learn your way through a crucial adventure to uncover the world's secrets.

name: Oh Balls Merge
description: Drop, merge, and score! Immerse yourself in the addictive ball-merging mania of Oh Balls and see how high you can go.

name: Long Knives
description: An oriental narrative mystery. The story branches upon your choices. The dice lies.

name: 勇者之灾 Calamity from the Yongzhe
description: This is an experimental RPG game. The work tells an adventure story set in a fictional world, revolving around the conflict and journey between the King who unified the world and a brave team of Yongzhe(Hero) on a quest to overthrow him. It's a grand adventure filled with both laughter and tears.

name: 宝姉妹 | スクラッチシミュレーター
description: 「宝姉妹 | スクラッチシミュレーター」は、ヤングガンガンで連載中のハートフルマネーコメディ漫画『宝姉妹』のキャラクターたちと一緒に、スクラッチくじ気分を味わえるシミュレーションゲームです。スクラッチを削って当たりマスをチェック。 タテ・ヨコ・ナナメのいずれか一列に同じ絵柄が3個並ぶと当たり！そろった絵柄に応じて当選金が受け取れます。 1等100万円当選を目指していっぱい削ろう！ ※本作はゲーム内のみで完結するスクラッチ風シミュレーションです。 現実のお金の売買・賭け行為・実在のくじとは一切関係ありません。 ゲーム内で当選しても、現金や実物の賞品がもらえることはありません。

name: Herofrenia Infinite Hyperdeath
notes: Not support English language. (Only Portuguese - Brazil)
description: Herofrenia Infinite Hyperdeath é um jogo top down shooter do universo do RPG multimidia Herofrenia! Conte com um arsenal variado de armas para compor seu arsenal em um estilo de jogo frenético com movimentação veloz, dash e mortes frequentes! Quanto mais sangue as coisas ficam mais lentas ao redor

name: エレベーション
description: 百貨店巡回ホラーアドベンチャー。かつて奇妙な使用方法で流行した鎮静剤「エレベーション」、上昇を続けるエレベーター、留まる時間。夜間警備員の青年二名が、上階を目指しつつ巡回し、各フロアで異常事態の真相を探る。

name: 토끼의 거짓말
developer: CIEN (씨엔) - Chung-Ang University IT Entertainment Club
description: Bunny's Lie is a real-time card game based on a moon rabbit in a Korean myth. Your luck doesn't matter in this match. You can win even if you don't have a good hand, if you just have wits and bluffing. Enjoy a fierce battle under the moonlight, with the cute bunnies. (ENG ver will be updated later.)
publisher: CIEN (씨엔) - Chung-Ang University IT Entertainment Club

name: 浮空秘境
developer: 厦门魔兔网络科技有限公司
description: 《浮空秘境》是一款经典日式RPG像素风休闲放置游戏。传说中光之女神缔造了神圣的埃蒙大陆，然而这里的魔法文明正悄然被恶念侵蚀，蛰伏千年的魔王即将复苏。纷乱的时空下，一个光怪陆离的梦开启了你尘封的记忆，你开始回想起遥远时光里的一切：在那片被战火倾轧的千疮百孔的大陆上，一直有一个坚毅背影引领人们走向光明，而那个背影就是身为执行者的“你”！ 记忆复苏意味着封印的松动，浮空大陆的沉浮命运再次交到了你的手中。面对即将来临的风雨，身处风暴中心的你将做出怎样的抉择……
publisher: 厦门魔兔网络科技有限公司

name: BND-Legenden: Operation Blackbox
description: BND Legends: Operation Blackbox is a tactical stealth adventure where you guide agent AJ through a fortified tech compound, infiltrate enemy systems, steal critical data, and complete clever minigames with support from your elite BND team.

name: TOREROWA
description: Explore dungeons in your spare time! Roguelike dungeon RPG with a party of up to 3 players to challenge dungeons!

name: Kando Realm
description: Journey into the world of Kando. Take on creatures, craft awesome weapons, help villagers and cut down tree's. Will you slay your way to the top? Or become a master craftsman. It's all down to you.

name: イマジナリーバッドフレンド
description: A short visual novel game in which a boy named Shiomi suddenly appears one day, and the protagonist, who recognizes him as an imaginary friend, converses with him to find out what happened between them.

name: Echo of Equilibrium
description: 无需构筑牌组，回归卡牌桌游原初的乐趣与节奏感！非竞技，比输赢更重要的是一起玩！

name: Crisis: The Third Way
description: "Crisis: The Third Way" is a fantastic visual novel set in a world struggling to recover from a devastating financial crisis that led to World War III.

name: Grenzgänger - Aus der DDR in den Westen
description: Jena, GDR. Assel, Michael, and Hanna live in the same neighbourhood and fight against state surveillance. Can they bring about the necessary changes, or will they have to flee? Help them find their way! [Only available in German!]

name: Poker Fate - Anime Girls Texas Hold'em
description: Poker Fate is an anime-style Texas Hold'em game featuring beautiful heroines. It combines easy-to-learn tutorials for beginners, high-stakes duels for top players, and a variety of thrilling tournaments. Join now and uncover the cards of your destiny with us!

name: Teddy Knight
description: Step into the paws of an unlikely hero and journey through the toy chest! In Teddy Knight, a physics-based action roguelite, you play as Teddy, a brave stuffed knight on a mission to save the toy world from evil. Engage in fast-paced combat with unique “bounce” mechanics in a dark toy universe.

name: Humanoid
description: Humanoid is a parody sci-fi arcade-style run-and-gun shoot 'em up in the style of an early 8-bit arcade game—with the added bonus that you can actually win. To survive, you need to play aggressively: you're rewarded for acting fast and clearing rooms. It is simple to play, difficult to win.

name: Battington Manor
description: Battington Manor is a kid-friendly VR first-person shooter guided experience where you will embark on a journey through haunted halls shooting evil bats with your holy water blaster and garlic bazooka to save the Battington family!

name: Space Aces
description: Space Aces is an indie space shooter that plunges you into an online universe full of action, strategy, and fierce competition. Step into the cockpit and evolve from a rookie pilot into the most feared Ace in the galaxy!

name: Diluted
description: Diluted is a 3/4ths puzzle adventure-action game where nightmares seep into reality. Play as Archie, an orphan bound to a living nightmare, and uncover the truth behind his matron’s orphanage as you explore twisted forests and corrupted memories.

name: Lizards VS Humans
description: A multiplayer FPS Sci-Fi game set in an alternate reality where reptilian beings battle humans for control of Earth. Features unique species-specific abilities, diverse weapon systems, and tactical gameplay.

name: Jumara
description: A tactical card game of structure and precision. Build decks, charge Totems, and master the Tox System , a logic-based sequence mechanic that defines every encounter.

name: Medieval Merchant
description: Guide a caravan through scattered medieval villages, supply them with goods, help them prosper ... and profit yourself as much as you can.

name: Summoners War
description: A global hit RPG that captured the Summoners all around the world! Jump into the Sky Arena, a world under battle over the vital resource: Mana Crystals. Design your own deck and strategy using 1,000 Monsters to claim victory. Go on an epic adventure with your Monsters!
Spookeningは3Dの恐怖ゲームで、あなたは毎夜に死んでゴーストとして復活します。 村人を怖がらせます。深夜に彼らの魂の力を取って復活します！

name: "Going Up?"
description: Because who wouldn't want to get trapped in an elevator with a yappy little dude? Check out this totally unique remake of the old-school RPGs. Run amok in a tower full of gold, weapons, magic, and of course--enemies!

name: "LIFE" not found;
description: This small Narrative Point & Click (Puzzle) game is about the mental health struggles of a adolescent high school dropout who's lost at life. Find out what they're struggling with, you might even recognize some things from your own life.

name: #7-J5Z: The Driftwood Experiment
description: A simple and short cozy game where you play as an unusual robot, exploring an underwater cave system.

name: (BURIED TAPES) The Cleaner

name: (BURIED TAPES) The Parking
description: Monica Jones, a 23 year old on an underground parking lot has lost her car keys, she didn't know what I was going to discover that night.

name: (Neg)Entropic Wandering
description: (Neg)Entropic Wandering is a short visual novel for Insomniacs. Wander through the depths of space to empty your mind and finally get some sleep.

name: (square)
description: Launch. Recall. Avoid.

name: *NEW* SCUFFED EPIC BHOP SIMULATOR 2023 (POG CHAMP)
description: Jump into it with *NEW* EPIC SCUFFED BHOP SIMULATOR 2023 POG CHAMP, a new parkour game which has spicy memes, graphics, and physics engine! Play with up to 10 friends in multiplayer and by yourself in single player!

name: *NEW* SCUFFED EPIC VISUAL NOVEL
description: This is *NEW* SCUFFED EPIC VISUAL NOVEL, which is a story set in the world of *NEW* SCUFFED EPIC BHOP SIMULATOR (#4 Best Selling free game of Steam November 2020), play as a character of your choice, as you run into some new, and familiar faces along the way.

The last scenery you faced was a quite unfamiliar hotel office. Leaving all the uncertainties behind, you have to perform significant or insignificant tasks from here on out. -256 is a pixel graphics first-person mystery hotel walking simulator.

name: .Forty-Five
description: A perfect mix of card game, rogue-lite, and pure wild west mayhem. Explore an ever-changing map, collect cards, and battle enemies. Cards are Bullets and are loaded into the revolver to gun down enemies. Experience .Forty-Five's innovative gameplay for free!

name: //TODO: today
description: A visual novel about figuring out life with the help of an AI. //TODO: today is a pastel colored slice-of-life story that let's you freely choose your pronouns and romantic preferences!
The game consists of finishing several levels, solving by clicking with the mouse or using the keyboard to complete the tasks.

A childhood friend has been missing for as long as you can remember. You decide to investigate the abandoned town in which he used to live only to find something truly unexpected and even more so unexplainable. Have you got what it takes to find out what happened to Chris Williams?

04/03/2017How much does this date tell you? For the main character, it became very significant, because this is the day of his death. The protagonist was precisely in the train that arrived at the metro station "Technological Institute" with the bodies of innocent, already dead, people ...

name: 0Gravity
description: 0Gravity is a game whose action takes place in zero gravity (predictably). Confuse your opponents and anticipate their actions to win in pixel 2D levels. There can be only one space marine!

name: 1 in a Million | A game of odds
description: Can you get the 1 in a million achievement on Steam?

name: 1 Screen Platformer: Prologue
description: FREE DEMO features 1 playable character and 1 complete level with leaderboards. Try, die, retry in this challenging but fair precision platformer that takes place on 1 screen. Ultra tight controls, dozens of traps. Great for speedrunning, and 100% completionists. Also, no water levels!

name: 1-Bit Explorer
description: An adventure game focused on exploration where you do NOT save the world and the world does NOT need saving.

name: 1.96.9 all update
description: The game is simple to play, with players using the mouse to search for hidden NPCs. The game allows players to save while playing, and there is no "game over" for players, making it easy to play. Some NPCs like to hide, so we recommend exploring the map thoroughly.

name: 10 Seconds
description: Time loop puzzle horror, where you're stuck in a failed experiment and must escape or face being eaten for eternity.

name: 100 Cats Lost in Turkey Find & Color
description: 🐱 Discover 100 hidden cats 🌍 in handcrafted scenes that capture the spirit of each country. Relax with color-by-numbers 🎨 and bring illustrations to life. Play solo or in cozy co-op 👯‍♂️, while Meow FM 🎶 sets the mood.

name: C4 Clicker: First Mint
description: Step into the crypto blockchain: smash clicks, farm parody coins, and mess with a full command-driven console that teaches you terms, indicators, chart types like Heikin Ashi, and hidden mini-games all wrapped in a satire-rich clicker.

name: Clean Stack
description: « Clean Stack » is a little puzzle game that involves stacking odd-sized objects with fun physics without making anything touch the ground. There are lots of different objects. You'll also need to use potions on the objects to get through the levels, which makes the game even more challenging!

name: Untold Story
description: A modernized turn-based RPG. Go on an adventure with your party, battle tough monsters and fierce foes, and save the world! A large cast with unique skills creates strategic turn based combat, with plenty of challenges to face.

name: Wizard’s Gambit
description: Wizard’s Gambit — A 2D strategy card game where four magical factions battle for dominance through tactical card placement, faction powers, and evolving decks.

name: 萍城异闻录(PingCity)
description: This is a different chicken eating game, where you can choose a main battle character to fight, defeat other players and monsters in the scene to earn currency, form your team lineup, and have rich combos to bring a different experience.

name: Brother Hai's Pho Restaurant
description: A story-driven psychological horror game where you must balance cooking authentic Vietnamese Pho with surviving chilling, unexpected events in a quiet, mysterious village.

name: N0-V4
description: N0-V4 is a science fiction/psychological horror art piece that treads along the lines of the ".exe" genre while taking inspiration from RPGMaker classics. You're a robot undergoing beta-testing. Is the end goal to ESCAPE THE GAME... or is it to OBEY Dr. (Mari) Machina, your creator?

name: Aye Leon
description: Glide your way to victory in this enchanting 2D platformer. Master your jetpack’s smooth glide through colorful, floating worlds packed with collectables. A full playthrough takes around 20 minutes, perfect for a quick burst of platforming adventure.

name: Empyreus
description: A short, free danmaku bullet hell following two gun-wielding angels as war unfolds in Heaven. Dodge dense Touhou-style patterns, face demanding boss fights, and uncover skill-based secrets in this tight retro experience. Survive the bullet hell and restore the bullet heaven!

name: Nightork Adventures 3 - Arena
description: Blast your way through magical chaos! Choose your totem, master the color-coded shield system, and unleash explosive power in Nightork Adventures 3 - the ultimate test of reflexes and strategy.

name: Dwarfare: All For The Forge
description: Be the dwarf you know you are! Build towers to protect the beacons and keep production in motion! Use your weapons to corner any enemies that scrape through. Do it- do it ALL FOR THE FORGE!!

name: [BEAT:KEEPER]
description: Vantan Game Academy TOKYO GAME SHOW 2025 Exhibition Match the rhythm of flowing notes, convert beats into power, and defeat your enemies! A psychedelic beat battle to bring sound (freedom) back to the people!

name: Fight Poker
description: Fight Poker is a turn based poker PvP card game. You try to form the best hand you can in 4 rows with help from the community cards. There is an online global play option, pass and play, and 5 difficulties of bot to fight against. It is great for any players who enjoy the strategy of poker itself

name: Let's Save Mice
description: Join up to three friends in this mouse-sized adventure! Explore, gather resources, solve puzzles, and battle enemies as you try to bring your kidnapped brothers and sisters home.

description: 🤡🎪🐾100 Funny Cats - Join the cutest adventure in the funny themed locations full of cats! 🤣🎈🐈 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of the Circus and Cats hidden throughout the game. 🕵️‍♂️❌ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈✅

description: Can you find all 100 Hidden Cats in America?

description: The frogs hid. Can you find them?

description: Take the role of Zoe, Deaths apprentice, and fight back against the 7 Deadly sins who stole the fragments of your soul, engage in fast paced top-down hack and slash action, fending off hoards of Hell's spawn. Gain buffs throughout the different levels to increase your power to take on the bosses....

name: Cooking Time!
description: A chaotic multiplayer strategic shooter where players cook different dishes and throw them at their enemies.

name: Everyday Devil
description: A short, linear story game of a random demon guy's life.

description: 🐱 Discover 100 hidden cats 🌍 in handcrafted scenes that capture the spirit of each country. Relax with color-by-numbers 🎨 and bring illustrations to life. Play solo or in cozy co-op 👯‍♂️, while Meow FM 🎶 sets the mood.

name: Out of Order zero
description: Shout at up to 4 friends in this chaotic colour sorting game. The towers are constantly rising, so you must sort them quickly. Purchase items and discover pets.

name: Sexy Beaches
description: Sexy Beaches is a casual idle dating sim where you upgrade girls' tropical islands to progress your relationships. Earn resources, unlock romantic scenes, and build your own beach paradise.

name: King's Devotion
description: Experience a world broken by war with one hope of redemption. Follow the tale of a general whose loyalty is put to the test when his kingdom is thrown into shambles. Friends may become enemies, and enemies may turn to friends.

name: Le Petit Raccoon
description: Le Petit Raccoon is a stealth cooking game where you must steal food to cook for your hungry guests! Steal food from the grocery store, but don't get caught! Time is of the essence, and your customers are waiting.

name: Duskbound
description: Pursue a cursed romance with a possibly unhinged vampire under the eternal glow of the red moonlight...

name: CRACKED
description: Physics-based wizard brawling! In CRACKED, glass-headed mages duel in chaotic 1v1 to 4v4 battles. Draft absurd upgrades, unleash wild spells, and shatter the competition in this 3D roguelike PvP arena.

name: KUMASAMA
description: A large brown shadow lurks in the abandoned factory; the night hides her form.Something terrifyingly massive is concealed within this town.I think of her, and of the days I can never go back to.“KUMASAMA” is a horror adventure set in the present day.

name: 100 Hiddensaurs
description: 100 Hiddensaurs is a hidden object game with dinosaurs. The game is drawn by hand.

name: 100 Istanbul Cats
description: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in the Istanbul 🕌, Türkiye full of cats! Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of Istanbul themed locations as you embark on a quest to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🕵️‍♂️❌ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈✅

name: 100 KILLS CHALLENGE: ORIGINS
description: Enter the fray in an intense, fast paced first person shooter experience. Kill using firearms, explosives, drones, and air support. Dominate maps in deathmatch, team, and PVE. Win with tactics - or sheer brutality. Remember: Hundred kills. One arena. Zero rules. May the best player win!

name: 100 Space Cats
description: 👨‍🚀🌌Join the cutest space adventure with Cats in Space! 🪐🚀 Explore charming hand-drawn space locations and adorable cosmo-cats on a quest to find 100 hidden kitties. 🕵️‍♂️❌ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈✅

name: 100 Waiting Cats
description: ⏳🐾 Join the cutest adventure in the funny waiting situations full of cats! Explore the charming hand-drawn artworks of While Waiting themed locations as you embark on a quest to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game.🕑🐈 🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈✅

name: 100% Challenge
description: Action arcade! CAPTURE enemies of your color and AVOID the rest to become the best in the world! Fast, addictive and 100% challenging!

name: 1000 Cuts: Jomaku
description: A challenging 2D action platformer with brutal one-hit-kill combat, consequential choices, and a lore-rich story set in the dark fantasy world of Kurogawa, Japan. Inspired by Sekiro and Blasphemous, Jomaku is a free preview of One-Thousand Cuts, "raising the curtain" for the full game coming soon!

name: 1001 Hugs
description: Kid friendly action game - to bring Christmas presents to Santa. For a low poly 3D shooter it has a unique gameplay. You have to hug key elves and deal with mischief ones to pass through levels. 1001 Hugs has a new game story, more levels, achievements, leaderboard, and character customization.

name: 100th Bug Brigade
description: 100th Bug Brigade is an accessible, story-rich, tactical, team-based roleplaying game featuring very cute bugs in a very uncute time.
To get to heaven, you must climb the Nine Circles of Hell. But you might never make it to the depths.

name: Limbus Company
description: As the Executive Manager of Limbus Company, lead your group of twelve Sinners, venture into the buried facilities of Lobotomy Corporation, and lay claim on the Golden Boughs.

name: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six Siege
description: Rainbow Six® Siege is the reference in tactical team shooters, where elite strategy and execution triumph. Enjoy free access to Quick Match, Unranked, and Dual Front game modes with a selection of operators.

name: The Sims™ 4
drm_notes: EA online activation and EA app software installation and background use required.
description: Play with life and discover the possibilities. Unleash your imagination and create a world of Sims that’s wholly unique. Explore and customize every detail from Sims to homes–and much more.

name: Destiny 2
description: Destiny 2 is an action MMO with a single evolving world that you and your friends can join anytime, anywhere, absolutely free.

name: Overwatch®
description: Overwatch®, A FUTURE WORTH FIGHTING FOR! Overwatch® is an always-on and ever-evolving free-to-play, team-based action game set in an optimistic future, where every match is the ultimate 5v5 or 6v6 battlefield brawl.

name: THE FINALS
description: THE FINALS is the world’s first Dynamism Shooter, a free-to-play, fast-paced, physics-driven, first-person shooter set on the stage of the biggest Gameshow of the future! Fight for Fans and fortune in fully-destructible, virtual Arenas that guarantee no two rounds will ever play the same!

name: Umamusume: Pretty Derby
description: Umamusume: Pretty Derby, winner of Best Mobile Game at The Game Awards 2025, is ready to race! Scout featured trainees and supporters as you navigate the immersive sports life simulation through the game's in-depth training system and top-of-the-line 3D graphics!

name: Eternal Return
description: Eternal Return is a free-to-play, 2.5D perspective Battle Royale game. Search, Craft, Hunt, and Fight using a variety of characters. Plan your strategy and become the last survivor on this eternal experiment.

name: World of Tanks
description: World of Tanks is a tactical action game with very different gameplay depending on the vehicle type and role. Aside from regular PvP, there are competitive and clan-based modes, special PvE and PvPvE events, and much more. Whether you play to dominate or just enjoy the ride, you'll fit right in.

name: World of Tanks Blitz
description: Blow off steam and tank turrets in a free-to-play online 7v7 tank shooter! Drive hundreds of tanks, from museum classics to "did-that-ever-exist?" specials, in quick 5 to 7-minute brawls packed with metal mayhem. Play solo or team up with a friend and enjoy smooth action even on modest hardware!

name: Guild Wars 2®
description: Guild Wars 2 is an award-winning online roleplaying game with fast-paced action combat, deep character customization, and no subscription fee required. Choose from an arsenal of professions and weapons, explore a vast open world, compete in PVP modes and more. Join over 16 million players now!

name: STAR WARS™: The Old Republic™
description: STAR WARS™: The Old Republic™ is a free-to-play MMORPG that puts you at the center of your own story-driven saga. Play as a Jedi, Sith, Bounty Hunter, or one of many other iconic STAR WARS roles in the galaxy far, far away over three thousand years before the classic films.

name: Russian Fishing 4
description: Russian Fishing 4 is a fishing simulator with RPG elements. There is no story line and the whole process is based on the concept of an open, free to roam and free to play game.

name: Shadowverse: Worlds Beyond
description: Shadowverse: Worlds Beyond is a brand-new strategy card game from the popular Shadowverse CCG. With the newly added super-evolution mechanic and Shadowverse Park, among other brand-new content, there is lots to enjoy for both seasoned and brand-new players.

name: The First Descendant
description: The First Descendant is a third-person looter shooter powered by Unreal Engine 5. Become a Descendant. Fight for the survival of humanity. Descendants have unique abilities to tackle both solo and co-op missions. Up to 4 players use varied mechanics to defeat giant bosses. BE THE FIRST DESCENDANT!

name: Murmurs of the Mist
description: In this game, you’ll encounter puzzles which require you to use your environment in order to solve them. Take note of every detail, they can help you in uncovering Sofia’s story.

name: LAVALAMP
developer: The Space Lemmings from Space Productions
description: 3D first-person walking simulator with a side of exploration/interaction with the environment. The game tells the story of the Space Lemmings from Space who, after running many experiments with breakfast alphabet and the space-time continuum, got blocked between dimensions (or something).
publisher: The Space Lemmings from Space Productions

name: Why? - Chapter 1
description: Why? is a horror game where you are trapped inside a magical mansion where a series of dreadful events took place. Its hallways twist into shifting labyrinths, while a relentless monster hunts you down. It’s up to you to hide… and survive.

name: Rogue Masters
description: Rogue Masters is a 6 player co-op horde survival game with souls-like combat and extensive character customization where you fight Entropy in long-lost civilizations.

name: Space Station: Beyond
description: Play as a variety of creatures or characters and try to survive either maintaining or attacking a space station while everything that can go wrong has already gone wrong.

name: Ascendancy
description: Watch a hundred AI-controlled characters, each with randomized stats, drop into a chaotic, obstacle-filled arena in an intense simulation. Scavenge weapons, armor, and loot scattered across the map while observing thrilling battles unfold in real time. only one can remains.

name: WonderKing
description: The return of classic 2D side-scrolling action! WonderKing is a free-to-play MMORPG packed with flashy combat and deep progression. Advance through diverse classes, master unique combos, and party up with friends for epic boss raids. Start your adventure today!

name: Virtual City Playground®: Build Your Metropolis
description: Relaxing city builder where you grow a vibrant metropolis, produce goods, manage transit and build iconic landmarks at your own pace.

name: Palia
description: Discover a welcoming world in Palia, a free-to-play fantasy life sim adventure where you can craft, explore, and create the life and home of your dreams. With nearly endless ways to make Palia your home, you’ll find relaxation and joy in every corner of this vibrant, heartwarming world.

name: STALCRAFT: X
description: STALCRAFT: X is the largest open-world online game in the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone. Explore the world full of mutants and anomalies alone or with friends — unforgettable emotions guaranteed.

name: Conqueror's Blade
description: Conqueror's Blade gives you a chance to be a true warlord. Commanding medieval troops in epic 15 vs. 15 siege battles, conquering cities with allies in the open world or fighting against players from all over the world – it's you who make the choice.

name: SMITE 2
description: Become a god and wage war in SMITE 2, the free-to-play Unreal Engine 5-powered sequel to the legendary third-person action MOBA. If you love challenging competition, intense action, ability-driven combat, rewarding teamwork, or godly mythology, you’ll see why 40+ million players love SMITE.

name: Blood Strike
description: Gather your friends and dive into the action-packed Battle Royale, Squad Fight, or Hot Zone like there's no tomorrow! Blood Strike offers a wide range of playable Strikers, each with a unique active and passive ability letting you deploy drones, shield walls and everything in between.

name: Strinova
description: Strinova is an anime-style third-person tactical competitive shooter. Switch freely between three-dimensional and two-dimensional forms in this one-of-a-kind game that offers a unique tactical shooting system for an unparalleled experience.

name: Poppy Playtime
description: You must stay alive in this horror/puzzle adventure. Try to survive the vengeful toys waiting for you in the abandoned toy factory. Use your GrabPack to hack electrical circuits or nab anything from afar. Explore the mysterious facility... and don't get caught.

name: DRAGON BALL GEKISHIN SQUADRA
description: DRAGON BALL GEKISHIN SQUADRA is Dragon Ball's first team-oriented free to play game.

name: skate.
description: Experience improved Flick-It controls, the rich physics based skateboarding gameplay that provides those “only in skate.™“ moments and off-board exploration for full freedom in the online multiplayer world of San Vansterdam.

name: Enlisted
