description: In Enlisted, you are not only commanding a single soldier, but an entire squad! This MMO squad based shooter recreates the key battles of the bloodiest war of the 20th century, with hundreds of soldiers, tanks and aircraft taking part in each battle.

name: Goose Goose Duck
description: Goose Goose Duck is a game of social deduction for up to 16 players. Players are separated into different groups that are each assigned a different objective. Complete your team’s objective to win!

name: World of Sea Battle
description: Set sail in World of Sea Battle, an action-packed open-world MMO in the Golden Age of Sail! Command historic ships, battle in PvP & PvE, shape the economy, and engage in territorial guild wars in your quest for glory across the high seas!

name: War Robots
description: War Robots is an online third-person 6v6 PvP shooter—we’re talking dozens of combat robots, hundreds of weapons combinations, and heated clan battles.

name: RuneScape ®
description: RuneScape is a high fantasy open world MMORPG. Explore an ever changing and evolving living world where new challenges, skills, and quests await. Featuring unprecedented player freedom, you choose how to play, adventure, and grow.

name: KARDS - Карточная игра о Второй мировой войне
description: KARDS, карточная игра в сеттинге Второй мировой войны, сочетает в себе традиционный игровой процесс ККИ с инновационными механиками, вдохновлёнными классическими стратегиями и реальной тактикой боя.

name: Draconis 8
description: Draconis 8: A fast-paced, highly accessible tactical card game. Each booster pack is also a fully playable, unique deck with 1 Dragon, 7 Champions, and 1 Terrain. Unlike other TCG-style games, each card is not only unique, but balanced. Play single-pack, constructed, or triple-pack - online or solo.

name: Archon Soul: Prologue
description: Archon Soul is a 2D roguelike dice-builder where you create powerful dice using swappable faces, runes, and bodies with unique effects. ​Draft spells, craft powerful synergies, defeat challenging enemies, and conquer the Archon's palace.

name: Megastore Simulator: Prologue
description: Expand from a small shop to a two-floor giant with Bakery, Clothing, Electronics, and more. Bake your own dough, hire staff, serve customers, and use forklifts and pallet jacks to keep the store running smoothly.

name: Ashes of the Forum
description: Ashes of the Forum is a 3d first person visual novel themed in ancient Rome with a polygon art style. You are a spy for a political faction and with turmoil in the city, you must find out who is ordering the assassination of top political figures, with simple interactions with NPCs to gather intel.

name: Catjong 2: Pawprints in the Snow
description: Catjong 2 is a mahjong-3 game with a playful cat! Enjoy 200 winter levels and build your cozy Alpine fair with Pawprints in the Snow.

name: Laugh Track
description: You're now the lead writer for Juno's World, a perfectly normal sitcom in which nothing strange or horrible happens, ever! Choose your scripts, decide what characters to build relationships with, and keep those audience ratings high -- or get cancelled in more ways than one! Welcome to Must See TV.

name: Survivors: Match-3 Island Adventure
description: Survive on a mysterious island after a plane crash! Solve match-3 puzzles, restore your camp, craft tools, grow crops, explore jungles and lagoons, uncover hidden treasures and reveal the island’s secrets!

name: White Memories
description: Take the mantle of a postman who refuses to give up his job, even after death. Clinging to your last memory, take off into the world of the forgotten to deliver your letters to the ghosts that are stuck there, allowing them to reach the afterlife. Protect your mail from those who are pursuing you.

name: Lost Trust-Episode 1
description: After years apart, you visit an old friend for what should’ve been a quiet evening. But you soon realize you’re not alone and a dark betrayal awaits .The game is a first-person, linear PSX-style experience focused on exploration and uncovering secrets.”

name: Reunion Online
description: Reunion Online is an open-world MMORPG with full cross-platform play. Fight monsters, team up with players, earn random loot, and grow your character through crafting and enchanting.

name: The Joy of Putting
description: Relive the era of Flash mini-golf games on more than 81 holes based on real courses! And do it... for The Joy of Putting!

name: Scope Battle Royale
description: Scope, a slow paced 100-player battle royale where memory wiped warriors fight for survival on a remote island. Dropped into a stylized world with no powers, only skill, strategy, and will-power.

name: MaSzyna
description: MaSzyna is a simulator which will allow you to become a train driver of most popular railway vehicles used on the Polish railways.

name: Blocky's Short Quest
description: Play as Blocky with super high jumping height in this 2D adventure platformer. Discover new worlds where Blocky's abilities change.

name: Green Tea Field Mayhem
description: Set against the beautiful Boseong Green Tea Fields of South Korea, this is a thrilling multiplayer psychological hide-and-seek game. Choose your role: become an adorable Tea Fairy protecting the tea leaves from mischievous Dokkaebi, or be a Dokkaebi tasked with stealing them.

name: Gestalt System
description: This is a multiplayer mech FPS game. You will choose your favorate robots, and work with teammates capable of different careers. Conquer the enemies, break the defense, activate energy core, destroy the buildings and finally win the game.

name: Ablossomreddish
notes: Not support English language (Portuguese - Brazil only).
description: A challenging platform and parkour game where every second counts. Run, jump, and perform precise moves to overcome intense and dangerous levels as you try to rescue your sister from the clutches of the powerful AblossomReddish corporation. Only the fastest and most skilled will make it to the end.

name: Song of Twilight
description: A horror adventure where you control two sisters trapped in a twisted otherworld, fleeing from the insane ruler known as "Father". Explore the realm of madness and find your escape. Your choices shape the story in this multi-ending experience.

name: Body & Soul
description: A 3D puzzle game. Possess different bodies to find the path to the Goal tile.

name: Run Coffee Run
description: A fast-paced FPS platformer where staying awake is the challenge. Unlock movement upgrades, explore a compact island, drink coffee to delay sleep, and find the fastest path to escape before you collapse. Also features a corporate office tower full of dogs.

name: Orbital Fighter
description: Take control of a fighter ship in this space-themed flight action game. Master the game’s signature mechanics—Just Dodge and Just Parry—to suppress the planetary fortress that serves as the rebel army’s stronghold.

name: 我的文字修仙世界
description: Crafted by 2 indie devs, this text-based immortal cultivation MMORPG features high freedom, true random drops and no AFK/single-player. 4 sects with unique builds, free skill/gear customization, auto-combat treasures, unrestricted Auction House trading. Anti-bot for fairness

name: 九州青云劫
description: 《九州青云劫》是一款东方仙侠开放世界 MMORPG，结合轻功探索、多人副本、跨服 PVP、自由交易、外观时装、坐骑侍灵与角色觉醒系统。体验国风玄幻大世界、御剑飞行、修仙冒险、帮派社交与沉浸式动作 RPG 战斗。

name: PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS
description: PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS, the high-stakes winner-take-all shooter that started the Battle Royale craze, is free-to-play! Drop into diverse maps, loot unique weapons and supplies, and survive in an ever-shrinking zone where every turn could be your last.

name: Once Human
description: Once Human is a multiplayer open-world survival game set in a strange, post-apocalyptic future. Unite with friends to fight monstrous enemies, uncover secret plots, compete for resources, and build your own territory. Once, you were merely human. Now, you have the power to remake the world.

name: GrandChase
description: Grand Chase is a free side-scrolling online action RPG with anime inspired graphics. Enjoy exciting adventures in dungeons and PvP with unique characters.

name: My Singing Monsters
description: Dive into the Musical World of My Singing Monsters! Breed them, feed them, listen to them sing! Breed & collect a menagerie of Monsters, each a living instrument! Build your paradise across 35+ Islands, customize your world, and enjoy endless music! There's never a dull moment in the Monster World!

name: Snowbreak: Containment Zone
description: The new 3D Waifu Sci-Fi RPG Shooter is here! Aim at fate, fight by our side! Clear the specified stage to claim an Orange-Tier Operative!

name: Sky: Children of the Light
description: A breathtaking open-world adventure awaits! Explore magical realms, restore lost light, and form wordless bonds with players worldwide. Complete quests and solve puzzles in seasonal events that celebrate kindness, discovery, and heartfelt connection.

name: Halo Infinite
description: From one of gaming's most iconic sagas, Halo is bigger than ever. Featuring an expansive open-world campaign and a dynamic free to play multiplayer experience.

name: Starward
description: The Steam version of 《Starward》 is an Asian server version, and the account is not compatible with other servers. Starward is a 3D fighting game that integrates mecha girls and classic GVG combat gameplay, with 1V1 and 2V2 mode as the core gameplay.

name: Action Taimanin
description: An intense, gorgeous hack-and-slash action RPG from the Taimanin fame!

name: ONE PIECE Bounty Rush
description: Take the loot, pirates! Bounty Rush is a 4 vs 4 multiplayer team action game. Work with your team to capture the other teams' berries!

name: MARVEL SNAP
description: MARVEL SNAP is a fast-paced Collectible Card Game that reimagines the genre with innovative mechanics. Winner of multiple awards like 'Best Strategy Game' and 'Breakthrough Game of the Year,' we invite you to join millions of players worldwide – Jump right in!

name: EVE Online
description: Over 20 years of legendary space battles! Explore a massive living universe of danger and opportunity in a challenging and highly rewarding space adventure. Fight, trade, build, and connect with a universe driven and shaped directly by players.

name: Party Party Anxiety!
description: A dating card game for anxious people. Use conversation cue cards up your sleeves to make connections. But beware—the more anxious you get, the scarier they become.

name: Project Homecoming Haven
description: Embark on a heartwarming journey as a home cleaning specialist.

name: Project KILLDANCE
description: Project KILLDANCE is a Noir tactical action featuring a one-army strategy and instant-death combat. Slowly observe surroundings, choreograph each killing move, leave no survivor, and become the spectral death.

name: Bubba Yuga
description: Bubba Yuga is a 2-player couch co-op puzzle game based on the Slavic folktales of the Baba Yaga. Playing as a pair of tied together witches, you and a friend must work together with your walking house to capture all the woodland children and break the curse that’s been placed upon your family.

name: The Calamity Trials
description: Complete platform parkour featuring multiple unique weapons and obstacles while IT chases you. These weapons will increase speed, or become another obstacle you must overcome.

name: Pantheon Poker
description: Pantheon Poker reinvents Texas Hold ’em as a mythology-themed digital card game. Play each hand with four random suits, each with unique mechanics that shift strategy and tactics every time. Use a powerful AI-powered luck mechanic to bend odds in your favor and outwit your opponents.

name: Lumi & The Lost Tablets
description: Lumi and the Lost Tablets is a family friendly 3D platformer. Jump, glide, and explore your way through multiple colorful areas and restore peace to the ocean!

name: 英雄之城3
description: Dear lord, welcome to City of Heroes 3, an epic war strategy feast! This game is like an encyclopedia of ancient civilizations. Open it and you will experience the rise and struggle of ancient civilizations.

name: Astral Party
description: Astral Party is a multiplayer party game populated by cute anime girls! Choose your favorite character, strategize skills & cards, and roll the dice to destroy friendships in this unique board game.

name: ヘブンバーンズレッド
description: Key 麻枝 准が描く、最後の希望を託された少女たちの物語『ヘブンバーンズレッド （ヘブバン）』 フィールドを駆け回り、かけがえのない日常を体験しながら、命を賭した戦いに挑むドラマチックRPG！

name: Wizardry Variants Daphne
description: 3D Dungeon RPG The portal of despair opens again. The labyrinth calls you to destruction. Revel in the endless dangers, relish the risk, devour the rewards. Savor the risk.

name: Horizon Walker
description: Eat God, and you will have everything—the story of a human who devoured God.

name: The Spike Cross
description: "The thrill of spiking in volleyball. Why don't you try it out?" Developed by an indie developer who loves volleyball! The sports game made after numerous trial and error to contain the appeal of volleyball!

name: Blush Blush
description: You are responsible somehow for a curse that befalls 12 unfortunate hawt dudes. Now you have to find them and break the curse with your love!!

name: Puck
description: Fast-paced physics-based hockey simulation where precision, strategy, and chaos collide. Control every move, pass, and shot with realistic puck physics, dynamic player movement, and thrilling gameplay. Master the rink with friends or team up with other Puck players for ultimate hockey dominance!

name: Your Chronicle
description: "Let's begin your own story." This is a text-based idle RPG game. There are already more than 3,000 unique story actions and it's still growing.

name: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator
description: Start your own Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria with Freddy Fazbear Pizzeria Simulator!

name: War Selection
description: War Selection is a compelling RTS game featuring base building, resource extraction and warfare. Evolve from a stone age tribe to a distinct industrial nation with unique game mechanics and battle for supremacy with dozens of players on a unique procedurally generated map.

name: Leaf Blower Revolution - Idle Game
description: Blow leaves, upgrade your gear, and automate your progress as you explore the Leaf Universe. A satisfying incremental idle game where every leaf blown brings you closer to the next big upgrade. Simple, relaxing, and endlessly rewarding. Let the leaves fall, and your progress rise!

name: EMERGENCY
description: Save lives – be a hero! Join forces against the chaos in the newest title of the award-winning EMERGENCY series. Take up your shift as incident commander and coordinate with other players to fight fires, arrest gangsters and rescue injured civilians. Your city needs you!

name: Cheese Rolling
description: Chase a cheese wheel down a steep hill! Tumble with friends in this ragdoll recreation of an English tradition.

name: Coloring Pixels
description: A relaxing coloring by numbers game. Enjoy completing a variety of images with differing themes, complexity, and sizes.

name: Quaver
description: Quaver is a community-driven and open-source competitive rhythm game with two game modes and online leaderboards. Create your own maps, or challenge the world in online multiplayer matches.

name: Idling to Rule the Gods
description: Idling to Rule the Gods is a free to play Idle-Game with a lot of content and some Minigames. Depending on your play-style, you can play it fast or slow. Either way it can be fun for hundreds of hours!

name: Dominion
description: Expand a small kingdom to a mighty Dominion! Play the Spiel des Jahres winning boardgame beloved by millions around the world. Discover the game that defined a genre, Dominion was first to popularize deck-building and remains a staple of tabletop. This is the officially licensed implementation.

name: Galaxy Idle Clicker
description: Embark on an interstellar journey with Galaxy Idle Clicker! Conquer galaxies, upgrade your spaceship, and face off against a myriad of enemy ships. With engaging minigames, powerful upgrades, GIC delivers an unparalleled idle space adventure. Join the cosmic conquest today and dominate the universe!

name: Airline Manager
description: Create and manage your own airline. Create both passenger and cargo routes all over the world while you upgrade and expand your fleet of airplanes and airports. Airline Manager is among the most realistic of its genre - so prove yourself and beat your friends and other real life managers.

name: Giant Snake Girl wants The Burger!
description: One silly Tsuchinoko's epic journey to feed The Burger to her Giant Snake friend.

name: EmuDevz
description: A game about building emulators! Implement your own NEEES core in JavaScript, get instant feedback with unit/video tests, build the graphics unit in real time, learn 6502 assembly, debug test ROMs, and have fun with the included homebrew games!

name: A Song Of Sunlight
description: An RPG set in a distant, lonely future. Follow Arem, a young man lured from his small island community to explore the desolate megastructure beneath it: “The Well.” With the simple goal of finding the exit, Arem will burden himself with something more terrible than he ever thought possible.

name: Legend Battles
description: Free-to-play UE 5.6 Extraction Battle Royale in 400 km² neo-futuristic world with destructible environment and vehicles, massive ET-ACUs, armored Aliens, ferocious Monsters, heavily armed MetaHumans, complete missions to attack, defend, loot, extract facing dynamic weathers.

name: 11th Dream
description: 11th Dream is a fast-paced third person abstract shooter aimed at hard-core difficulty enthusiasts and fast runners. Visit a place after biological history, where bots became tools for other tools.

name: 11号小镇综合症
description: 欢迎来到11号小镇，在这个诡异的小镇里，您是一位新来的画家。为了完成镇上居民们的绘画委托，您需要收集对话中的关键词，将关键词提炼成绘画素材组合到画布上。面对居民们奇怪的委托，您能顺利完成作画并融入镇子，证明自己是“正常”的吗？

name: 12 bananas
description: Leap over treacherous chasms, navigate past a sea of hazards, and locate all 12 bananas as you embark on an epic quest and travel the patience-testing path that lies ahead in this infuriatingly challenging, unforgiving, puzzling, memey platformer.

name: 12 Hours to Die
description: A mystery visual novel about six students forced to play a 12-hour long killing game.

notes: English language not supported - Chinese only
description: 本遊戲以日治時期的小說家、影人劉吶鷗生平為故事文本，以臺灣文學館收藏劉吶鷗的麻將牌為關鍵道具，遊戲舞台從上海百樂門、天津萬國橋、黑龍江大興安嶺、北京明陵地宮到臺灣臺南州廳。在科幻背景中，使玩家進行一場益智解謎遊戲。

name: 15 puzzle
description: A classic game of puzzle 8 (3x3), 15 (4x4), 24 (5x5) or 35 (6x6) in which player has to move pieces on board so they are from 1 to 8, 15, 24 or 35.

name: 13iew
description: A girl abandoned in the basement of a hospital for some reason. Escape the hospital avoiding the doctor who abandoned the girl in the basement! Complete the story through hidden foreshadowings and various devices throughout the map and find out why the doctor abandoned the girl in the basement.

name: 13:ORIGIN - Prologue
description: 13: Origin is a web of clues that you must follow and not miss, as in most room escape/puzzle games. As you untie each knotted loop, you will realize how long and endless the thread you hold on to the end is.

name: 1306 Chapter 1: Reactors & Robots
description: Join 1306, a little reactor maintenance robot, on a terrifying new adventure filled with robotic horrors! Get the rods. Fix the reactor. Prevent the meltdown! Most importantly, don't get disassembled.

name: 13 Candles
description: 13 Candles is an atmospheric horror game where you play as Sara, 13 year old girl who wakes up in an abandoned hospital. Find your way to the light switch and wake up from your nightmare.

Welcome to the 1980s! This is a city which just started to develop, and you're in charge of this small urban village. How will the city's future be tied to this place? Manage your land, construct new buildings, explore the stories, and find out the ultimate fate of this urban village!
1982 is a FREE retro inspired blasta-thon that will test your gaming skills to the max.
1990 is a fun, casual RPG with turn-based combat.

name: 1BIT CASTLE
description: 1BIT CASTLE is a little tower defense game in which we are defending castle from the monsters.

name: 1X1
description: Become a little soul lost in a dangerous factory, avoid obstacles and battle bosses. A challenging bullet hell game where you advance by opening and closing doors!

name: 2 Minutes 16 Seconds (2分16秒)
description: This is a 2D Pixel Top-Down Space Shooter Game. The game implemented Rogue-Lite elements, like the survivor series.

name: 2,4D Game
description: Take up your sword and seek vengeance in 2,4D! As a knight whose village was destroyed, you embark on a journey of retribution. Battle through intense platforming challenges, deadly enemies and uncover the truth behind the attack. Will you reclaim your honor and bring justice to your fallen home?

name: 20 Small Mazes
description: This is a puzzle game with twenty small mazes. They're good mazes, though.

name: 20,000 Miles Under the Sea
description: Become a fearless underwater explorer and reach the bottom of The Mariana Trench to win 20,000* REAL DOLLARS!

name: 2023: Alien Bugs Invade Earth
description: Why are alien insectoids invading Earth in 2023? This narrative driven 2D shooter pits you against a seemingly hopeless battle against the invading Insectoids. How will you (and Earth) manage to survive? What hidden technological, historical, and spiritual secrets will you discover as a result?

name: 2024: Aliens Are Coming
description: An Indie Sci-Fi Adventure game that thrusts you into the heart of the secrecy surrounding UFOs and Aliens. Visit exotic places, meet Aliens, make alliances and enemies alike as you make critical decisions and fight for what you think is right. Time is short, because it's 2024, and Aliens Are Coming!

name: 2024: Mosaic Retrospective
description: 2024: Mosaic Retrospective is a charity-fundraising picross/minesweeper hybrid featuring a single ENORMOUS puzzle inspired by global news stories from throughout the year.

name: 2099 Gravity Havoc
description: Shoot at enemies in a WEIGHTLESS space station to save yourself from burning alive in the atmosphere!

name: 20b
description: Eight peculiar students, a pair of highly-trained assassins, extraterrestrials plotting a full-scale invasion of Earth, a secret society on the verge of toppling the US presidency and a Doomsday cult gearing to wipe California off the map.

name: A 20-year-old RPG Maker game remade with the latest RPG MAKER UNITE and available for free?! ~The Heroes of the RPG Maker series vs. the Demon Lord~
description: The game that was created 20 years ago with RPG MAKER 2000 has been remade in the latest RPG MAKER UNITE!(←the story setting, but it's true that RPG MAKER UNITE was made!) Let's enjoy this new RPG Maker experience, which fuses nostalgia and chaos!

name: 2236 A.D. Secretary Stories
description: A prequel to 2236 A.D. which features a nonsensical story between man and AI that seems heartwarming but may actually be heartwarming. In other words, it's a visual novel about how Masuko is cute.

name: 2310 seconds in HELL
description: This is a very short game. Has an average level of difficulty. If you do not know what to do, then try to complete this game in less than 2310 seconds.

name: 25 Layers of Pain
description: Are you tired of being happy? Does life keep giving you everything you want? Are you finally ready to turn that frown right-side-up? Play 25 Layers of Pain. The game for masochists.

name: 256vs256
description: This Game is Simple! Light! Dynamic! You can experience playing a classic game of 'Go' or 'Chess' while playing a '3D Real-Time Battle Game'. You can also feel the emotions of the Battle Field.
Three dimensional grid turn-based strategy game. Combat the computer or your friends to prove your brain is less smooth than theirs.

name: 270 | Two Seventy US Election
description: Do you have what it takes to become President of the United States? Can you win the Two Seventy (270) Electoral Votes needed for victory in the US Election?

name: 2DGameManias Taken
description: 2DGameManias Taken is a 2.5D retro platform game in which you have been Taken by the unknown and you need to fight your way to freedom.

name: 2ECONDS TO STΔRLIVHT: Forever My Diamond
description: As graduation looms, true feelings begin to surface. Will Grace find the courage to overcome her shyness and bare her heart to Sera, or will her handsome rival Akira get to her first? A free VN about being really gay for your best friend. Part of the NOISZ series, and prequel to NOISZ STΔRLIVHT.

name: 2ECONDS TO STΔRLIVHT: My Heart's Reflection
description: "The day I put that uniform on, I saw myself in the mirror for the first time. And I dared to think, maybe, just maybe..." A free VN about standing up to the world to be yourself. Part of the NOISZ series, and prequel to NOISZ STΔRLIVHT.

name: 2tinycowboys
description: 2tinycowboys is an action-packed western-themed arcade multi-scrolling platformer in 2D, with huge variety, in which you take the role of one of 9 different cowboys, each with his/her own play-style. It has up to 4 players split-screen multiplayer available and quirky game-play and characters.

name: 3 Blind Mice: A Remediation Game for Improper Children
description: A remediation game designed for last attempt corrections for particularly troubled youth. Failure to complete this game may result in removal from society. Please do not attempt to find the surveillance units. They are only present for monitoring your progress. Have a pleasant day.

name: 3 Days War
description: 3 Days War is a unique multiplayer strategy war game. Integrating the mechanics of RTS+4X, it allows dozens of players to engage in a three-day real-time strategy competitionon. Commanders, use your skills, strategies, games and even deception to become the ultimate winner!

name: 3 O'clock Horror
description: This is a Lovecraftian-inspired tale of a man writing the horrors of the one night he visited his great uncle's mansion to remember what actually happened at 3 am during the visit.

name: 30 Days to be the Best - Ultimate Edition
description: You have a dream... but the clock is ticking. Your determination and your own two fists are all you have left. Make them count. 30 Days to be the Best is a 3D fighting game with RPG and time management elements.

name: 300k - The Game
description: ...a funny implementation of the cellular automaton theory.

name: 36 apples
description: Collect apples and uncover the secrets of a self-contained world.

name: 3AM CORP: The Balbazar Resort
description: Beware of Balbazar in this horror/psychological thriller adventure. Evade the enigmatic Balbazar, use your wits and homemade sleuth kit to capture proof that something ominous is happening, and make it out alive. Do not get caught. The cops aren't doing anything... perhaps there's a reason.

name: 3am on Fish Island
description: Walk the streets of Fish Island and collect food. Become sober. Stay alert. There are ghosts. Made with the Godot Engine.

name: 3Buttons
description: 3Buttons is a short free-to-play platformer where you will only need three buttons to play! Choose between three different geometrical shapes; Sphere, Capsule, and the dreaded Cube. There are three different campaigns, in each you can submit your High Score for the global leaderboards! Good luck.

name: 3Cushion Masters
description: This is a game that has signed an official license contract with a professional sports league hosted by the Professional Billiard Association (PBA).

name: 3D Aim Trainer
description: The #1 free aim trainer - now on Steam and SteelSeries GG. Join 13+ millions of FPS/TPS players improving flicks, tracking & reaction speed with pro drills, analytics & leaderboards. Dominate in Valorant, CS2, Apex & more. Play free and start hitting every shot. #AimToConquer

name: 3D Paraglider
description: Do you dream of flying without restrictions, getting as close as possible to mother nature? If yes, then 3D Paraglider is for you.

name: 3D Text Adventure
description: This Australian Indie studio is committed to converting the old Infocom text adventures to 3d first person adventures. 3D Text Adventure is the first of these to be developed. These infocom remakes are practically exactly the same as the originals.

name: 3DC
description: 3DC is a graphic adventure that teaches children from 8 to 12 years old what depression is.

name: 3x64
description: Connect blocks of the same colors on the constantly changing gravity! Try to survive as long as possible - you can call for help many mighty powerups or even craft your own!

In the year 2040 you and the 12 billion inhabitants of the Earth fled from the Earth after being attacked by extraterrestrials, you took refuge on a planet named 4004-022, but this planet is also being attacked by aliens.

name: 404Sight
description: 404Sight is a free game made in support of net neutrality. It’s a 3D playground runner influenced by parkour running with the addition of a special ping ability that reveals areas that can speed the player up or slow them down.

name: 41 Hours: Prologue
description: 41 Hours is a first-person shooter dramatic game that follows the narrative of Ethan, a workaholic scientist in search of his long-lost wife. This is a one-hour prologue of the incredible, action-packed journey.

name: 4D Minesweeper
description: 4D Minesweeper brings the classic mechanics of Minesweeper into the fourth dimension and adds some new features to it.

name: 4D:XD
description: 4D:XD is a top-down 2D bullet hell space shooter. Conquer the game with as few deaths as possible!

name: 4fools1
description: 4Fools1 is game combined bullet-hell with interactive-fiction. Player will play as an imperial soldier, navigating through choices to uncover different endings in the story mode. Alternatively, one can engage in direct combat with diverse enemies in level mode, striving to become the last survivor.

name: 4STORY : The Original
description: Between Berkilious, the God of Destruction, and Lea, the Goddess of creation, long-lasting antagonism has repeated numerous creations and destructions. In the name of the Goddess Lea, exists the world of Iveria. In this world of chaos, will there be a hero to end this war once and for all?

name: 4Prot
description: 4Prot is an interactive prototyping laboratory that allows you to create virtual spaces for students and professionals to creatively build different types of prototypes. The free version of 4Prot allows you to save 2 projects with 100 blocks each.

name: 2D Dawg 2
description: Продолжение, которое никто не ждал и не просил! Встречайте - 2D Dawg 2! Ну если кто не понял, это типа сиквел той самой первой новеллы, где Макс с Тайхеем вместе... спит.

name: 2D Platformer GAME (Toy Factory)
description: It is a 2D adventure game with cute characters.

name: 4X-Galaxy 无主之地：银河
description: “4X-Galaxy” is a game developed by the 4X concept system(eXplore、eXpand、eXploit、eXterminate)

name: 5 Crowns
description: When crowns tremble and oaths shatter, Bianké ignites. Gather your allies, wield steel and cunning, and lead the Amethyst Fangs in a tactical RPG where every decision forges the story… or dooms it.

name: 5 Minute Climb
description: 5 minutes to jump to the top. Fall and it's back to the start.
COLLECT MEMBERS!ENFORCE YOUR MEMBER!MAKE YOUR OWN RAIDER!

name: 50 Floors: The Paranormal Investigators Prologue
description: Find a way out.

name: 500 Second Challenge
description: As the ladder gets faster and narrower, can you increase your living space through the upgrade system? Last for 500 seconds, and your gameplay will be different from everyone else's depending on how your skills level up.
Each time you press the button, it will either double or lose all the points you’ve put in. How much will you risk?

This is a story with illustrations. You have to choose your destiny. You are obsessed with the idea of creating an ideal society. One day you come up with a genius idea, and you create a society that could live forever, BUT HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE!!?

name: 5Leaps (Space Tower Defense)
description: 5Leaps is a retro-futuristic strategy game "Tower Defense" style.

name: 6 Feet Behind
description: Your pursuer is your only weapon.

name: 6 PEOPLE
description: A man travels in a subway car alone. Where is he going? Will he or any of his fellow passengers arrive at their destination? Are they drawn together by pure coincidence, or something more sinister?

name: 6 Seasons and a Game
description: This is a completely free, volunteer made, multiplayer, satirical parody of common thematic elements found in American broadcast television serieses (yes that's actually a word)

name: 6-Mon Adventure
description: Embark on an adventure with 6-mon the little robot. Take control of the robot and travel through a disused factory, avoiding falls, protecting yourself from projectiles and traversing dangerous levels to stop the activities of a crazy AI.

name: 69 Balls
description: A Third-Person shooting game but you are not a person. You are a BALL! Imagine a pool ball, a shotgun and football mechanics mashed together! You said you can't? Neither do I! Just shoot everything you see and pray if the black ball goes in!

name: 6th Dimension
description: You have been dropped into the 6th dimension. Let's hope you can make it back to reality.
7 is a puzzle platformer, literally, by the numbers.

name: 7 Bones and 7 Stones - The Ritual
description: 7 Bones and 7 Stones - The Ritual is a multiplayer (4vs1) action adventure game where one player takes on the role of a terrible Monster and the other four players play as Villagers, trying to perform a ritual while hiding and running from the Monster.

name: 7 Jobs at the Same Time
description: A Point and Click work simulator where you juggle 7 jobs to pay your debt. Start by doing simple spreadsheet and progress to more important job like overseeing a nuclear bomb.

name: 7 Years War
developer: Jason Jackson, Justin Carranza, Jude Pierre, Evan Tomksy
description: Top-Down 2D action/adventure about the French-Indian War in North America.

name: 7Groves
description: A game in which you explore surreal and beautiful forests.

name: 7 summer days: Youth sky
description: A visual novel that takes place in the same universe as "7 summer days".

name: 7776 II: Dwarven Greed
description: Get precious gem stones for poker combinations coming from the game machine. The dwarf who obtained most valuable gems after 12 turns gets a beer.

name: 77th: The Game
description: 77th: The Game is an abstract representation of the experience of joining an online community. Walk through the community and solve the puzzles to progress as a community member.

notes: English language not supported - Korean only
description: One day, the boy is suddenly caught up in an incident and is forced to face problems he has been avoiding, giving him an opportunity to think about himself. And the boy comes up with a solution on his own. What choice did the boy make?

name: 8/8/88 Needle AL
description: On the ominous date of 8/8/1888, the entire population of Needle, Alabama seemingly vanished, leaving behind only a haunting silence and an eerie sense of dread. A first-person psychological-horror drama.

name: 8Bit Fiesta - The Drinking Game
description: 8Bit Fiesta brings everything you need to the table with its action packed local multiplayer mayhem including a built in drinking game! Choose between a ton of characters and challenge your friends and prove yourself worthy the title "King of the Fiesta".

name: 8BitMMO
description: 8BitMMO is a retro-style 2D massively multiplayer game! It's a giant construction sandbox -- you can build a home or a castle in a persistent streaming world. Found and manage your own city. Fight evil LawyerCats and engage in Player vs Player battle.

name: 8minSurvival
description: It is a top-down shooting game where you have to survive for 8 minutes from pursuing enemies to clear the game.

name: 9 Games, 2 Buttons
description: In this game you play up to 9 minigames at the same time, at game speeds of 50-300%. You use the numberpad and QWE down, which match where the minigame is on the grid. Push for a new high score, trash talk your friends!

name: 9 Years of Dreaming
description: 9 Years of Dreaming is an action-adventure game where you explore the subconscious of Jacob, who has been in a coma for nine years after a car accident. Trapped in a surreal dreamscape, Jacob meets Lumby, a mysterious guide who helps him on his journey to wake up.

name: 9.03m
description: The media is quick to put figures to death tolls in such disasters, and 9.03m tries to remind people of the individuals behind those figures. 9.03m is set on Baker Beach in San Francisco, where debris from the tsunami has washed ashore in the years following the tsunami. To play, you must find the butterflies.

name: 90 Minute Fever - Online Football (Soccer) Manager
description: 90 Minute Fever is an online football management game that offers extremely challenging gameplay where you get to compete against others from all over the world!

name: 99 Anime Girls
description: 99 Anime Girls is a cute anime-style indie platform game full of action, adventure and surprises. Rescue each girl on the platform levels, then adventure and chat with them to gather resources, progress the story and uncover a multitude of secrets.

name: 996的真实老板篇
notes: English language not supported - Chinese only
description: 这是一个模拟经营的文字小游戏，主要模拟国内IT公司，如何充分利用员工加班经营到高分的一个过程，内容源自现在比较有争议的996加班制问题，因为我算是见证网络游戏行业发展的人，结合10几年的经历对现在的状况是有一套自己的理解，1个月前突发奇想觉得可以做一个模拟这种加班利弊的小游戏，来表达自己的看法，于是就动手了，到今天才刚出炉，这部是老板篇，主要模拟经营游戏开发过程中如何把控员工情绪，提高工作效率，追求最大利益的一个过程，看看最终你会是一个什么结果。

name: 9Dragons
description: 9Dragons is a free to play MMORPG with fluid martial arts combat, lush environments, and intense PvP. Immerse yourself in a mesmerizing world set in ancient China at the beginning of martial arts chivalry.

name: 9SHOT
description: This game is purely for catharsis; there's no main storyline and it will never conclude "9Shot" is a first-person shooter game set in a zombie-infested Tokyo streets. Your objective is simple: survive against waves of zombies for as long as possible. Earn points by killing zombies to upgrade weapons

name: Service Please: First Dinner
description: Service Please: First Dinner is a free introductory experience to Service Please, focused on the core flow of running a restaurant. Serve your first customers, learn the basics, and get a taste of the deeper management systems waiting in the full game.

name: The End of the World and Her Room
description: The End of the World and Her Room is a short, free point-and-click puzzle game. This is a quiet and fleeting story: in the final moments, inside her room, you observe the surroundings, search for clues, unlock her phone’s password, and slowly understand the traces the world has left behind.

name: Echoed Nights
description: Trapped in a realm of shattered memories, monsters hunger for you to join them in decay. Navigate this first-person indie horror—collect fragments, evade the creatures, and uncover what you left to rot. Your memories may echo… but your scream might not.

name: Taleweavers Alliance Anthology
description: A linear visual novel featuring five different Ontario (Canada) youths' stories. Each story has a different art style and subject matter, and we worked closely with the storytellers to ensure their voices come through authentically. Indigenous & LGBTQ2S+ are major themes.

name: Tenshoku Maou
description: Command your demon squad in this epic RPG and master every battle! Smash enemies through slick battles, boost your maidens with gear, and forge their loyalty. Dive into a dark fantasy saga of betrayal and power, where stunning visuals and voiced characters bring the story to life.

name: Tenshoku Maou: 18+
description: Command sexy, obedient waifus in this dark rogue-lite RPG packed with auto-battles, anime-style art, and epic H-scenes. Train your harem, break your enemies, and unlock wild H-Scenes as you rise through lust and domination on a filthy power trip. Your villain era starts now!

name: Gaia Maker
description: Gaia Maker is a planet-wide simulation game of terraforming, based on real physics and geology. As the planet's overseer, wield advanced technologies to reshape barren planets into life-filled worlds. Foster animal life, cultivate civilizations, or destroy them. Their fate is in your hands.

name: Ball Chasers
description: A goofy 2v2 multiplayer party soccer brawler where classes, crazy abilities, and pure chaos replace rules—score goals, troll opponents, and embrace the mayhem across wacky maps.

name: Taimanin Squad
description: Lead your squad of captivating girls in this Strategic RPG!

name: Exit: Echoes of insanity
description: A routine night turns into a true nightmare. You are a psychologist trapped in a building filled with unsettling secrets and rooms that seem to watch you, while an unknown presence follows you without rest.

name: >SYS//PURGE_
description: >SYS//PURGE_ is a free, fast-paced FPS inspired by 90's classics, with roguelike elements. Collect items, stay alive and descend deeper into the facility. You take control of an LN-X unit, a glitch breaks you out of the Overseer's control. Make it burn.

name: Vellum: Raid Night Study Hall
description: Brush up on your fighting mechanics with Raid Night Study Hall - your worry-free (and actually free) guide to boss fights! Learn, practice, and don't stand in the fire! You will be prepared!

name: The Little Grass Simulator
description: A minimalist experience: become a lonely blade of grass in the wilderness.

name: Cannon Ball
description: A 1-on-1 turn-based strategic shooting game themed around cannon bombardment. Strategically use shells and terrain to strike your enemies and claim victory!

name: Escape Gaia:Departure
description: you will play as Gaia, the shattered will of a planet, and command your spaceship to explore new worlds, collect and refine various resources, build a home on the damaged spacecraft, summon a wide range of monsters, and ultimately, devour other shattered wills to repair yourself.

name: Gorilla Simulator
description: Gorilla Simulator - Play with other gorillas, explore the map, participate in random events, collect bananas, hats and climb the mountain to collect Pineapple!

name: Punk Plush Panic
description: Punk Plush Panic is a free to play chaotic 2.5D platformer in which players swap between 3 characters, using their explosive elemental combinations to fight off waves of gluttonous aliens.

name: Aye! My Liege
description: A grand strategy game set in an alternate history. Lead your noble house to power using a 4-tier command system that allows for granular management of every individual soldier. Master complex industrial chains, navigate tariffs, and balance diplomacy to shape the continent's ultimate fate.

name: Pizza Empire
description: A warm, retro pixel art idle game that's terribly satisfying. Click, automate, prestige — and build your empire one pizza at a time.

name: Koltera 2
description: Gather resources, craft items, and grow a team of creatures in this relaxed incremental idle RPG. Automate your skills, send creatures on expeditions, and keep progressing even while offline.

name: Steam Revolution: The Age of Rail
description: Build rail networks that link industries in 1844 Europe. Complete levels to expand across nations, and compare the efficiency of your solutions against a leaderboard.

name: PoliCromix
description: PoliCromix is a strategic online TCG where placement matters. Deploy cards on dynamic boards, trigger automatic battles through directional attacks, and grow your collection while competing against real players across multiple universes.

name: Keito
description: Drop colorful yarn balls from above and bounce them to the bored cat to delight them! Combine yarn balls of the same color to earn more points. Reach the target score as quickly as you can!

name: Sashimi Slayer
description: Sashimi Slayer is a casual arcade rhythm game with an open-source IRL sword controller. Prove your sword (and rhythm) skills facing down some crazy sea creatures. Parry their strikes and land the perfect cut!

name: Two Rings: Vanquish and Bloom
description: An isometric action game where you wield the power of destruction and creation in your hands, literally. Right hand attacks, left hand regenerates. Ascend through the divine realms through combat that rewards strategic resource management and precise execution.

name: Marrowtide
description: Marrowtide is a strategy-focused experience intended to unify the core mechanics of the legendary strategy mechanics from Slay the Spire’s deckbuilding on XCOM’s 3D battlefield and action system.

name: 到达彼岸
notes: English language not supported - Chinese only
description: This is a survival adventure game. Use special cubes to navigate mazes, evade zombies, find keys and healing items, and escape. Solve puzzles with switches and portals across 8 moderately challenging levels. Block chasing zombies with the cube to make them retreat.

name: 1根香腸走江湖
notes: English language not supported - Chinese only
description: 《1根香腸走江湖》是一款充满欢乐与搞怪元素的搞笑版传奇手游，它在继承经典传奇玩法的基础上，加入了大量诙谐幽默的设定和搞笑元素，让玩家在热血冒险的同时，也能笑出腹肌，为玩家带来了一场欢乐的游戏盛宴！

name: 重生之我在桌面修仙
notes: English language not supported - Chinese only
description: 《Immortal Rebirth: Desktop Cultivation》 is a relaxing idle desktop pet game. Watch your character automatically meditate, concoct pills, and fly on a sword right on your desktop. Build your own miniature realm, unlock multiple lives through reincarnation, and accumulate power even while offline.

name: あれぐろもるとがいきのこるゲーム
description: A 2-player co-op survival action game. Automatically attack waves of enemies, collect EXP to level up, and survive for 3 minutes to face the final boss. Revive your fallen ally by staying close!

name: 拾取宝石后意外觉醒了复制魔王力量的逆天技能
description: 结合策略与随机性的魔塔like+肉鸽lite游戏。玩家将操控角色妖狐，魅惑&幻化各个NPC，利用复制敌人攻击力的独特技能与其他特殊技能，击败各个强敌，挑战魔王。

name: 沙城争霸
description: 沙城争霸，原创剧情📖鏖战超级大陆🌍！上线即享自动回收等四重豪礼🎁，装备全爆💥，不氪不肝🛡️！20个超级分身助力👥，刀速飙升+999%💨！免费会员👥，零充畅玩通关🎉！

name: 拜剑·我们的冒险
description: You are a commander, and you will strategically arrange all your cards to defeat opponents from various worlds. It's not just about sparring and combat; you may be able to achieve endings that those worlds never reached by reconstructing the storybook.

name: Enthaur : Lost in Slumber
description: Enthaur is a poetic and visceral solo first person journey where players are launched in a decaying world made of flesh, where they need to play with body-like mechanics to survive.

name: Shed Skin, Bleed Ink
description: In this digital ritual, you will carve sigils into your flesh—quite literally. Take a pen, marker, or anything you can use to write on your skin, and inscribe sigils onto your body, reincarnating the prophet and becoming their vessel. This is an honor unlike any other.

name: Flaurel's Diaries
description: A visual novel about my OC, Flaurel. Her full name is Flaurel Gerania el Caryana. She’s a character, but also a part of me. I hope you enjoy reading her story as much as I enjoyed writing it. Thank you for playing.

name: Metal Hunter
developer: 常州市华蓝德软件科技有限公司
description: This is an imitation of a JRPG with a dual system of humans and tanks. In the ruined wasteland world, humans drive chariots to hunt down various monsters and hunt down powerful wanted criminals. These people are known as 'Metal Hunters' by the world!
publisher: 常州市华蓝德软件科技有限公司

name: Coco Block
description: Coconuts drop from above – click to block them before they bonk your monkeys. Bananas fall too – let the monkeys eat them for points and combos. The longer you keep the monkeys safe and feed them bananas, the faster the coconuts fall. How high can you score?

name: words from pluto...
description: An experimental platformer where words are tied to movement. Guide Pluto up the strange mountain and figure out what secrets are held within.

name: Gods of Angling
description: Gods of Angling is a "Tamagotchi-like" Idle Fishing RPG! Create your hero from one of 180 unique options and see if they can ascend from a reel rookie to a God.

name: Dark Ride: Sweet Dreams
description: Dark Ride: Sweet Dreams is a cozy VR dark ride.

name: UMBRA
description: A top-down survival horror experience set aboard an abandoned spaceship. Manage limited light sources, avoid hostile creatures, and survive without combat.

name: Gibby's Candy Store
description: A free, candy-coated arcade game inspired by Space Invaders. Built fast, shipped faster, and made to be played. Grab it, blast some baddies and collect some sweets.

name: Idle Cats Dungeon
description: Recruit different cats, level them up, and gather treasure all from the corner of your screen. Idle Cats Dungeon is an incremental desktop game where adventure runs alongside your daily tasks. Can you slay more enemies than other players?

name: Pirate Ships
description: Pirate Ships is a PvP game about shipbuilding and naval battles. Embark on an epic journey together with other players and fight monsters, pirates and thieves to become the greatest pirate in all of the Caribbean!

name: Monday Left Me Broken Collection
description: Monday Left Me Broken is finally on Steam. In this massive collection of every Monday Left Me Broken game to date, you get to solve difficult puzzles; survive a rampage from an evil cat; and collect all of the MLMB cats.

name: Take a Hint
description: Take a Hint! is a comic-style visual novel where you control Delfina and must convince your best friend Ailén that her boyfriend is not good for her. It won't be easy, and no one will leave until the truth comes out.

name: JIN
description: JIN is a modern traditional strategy board game where every move matters. Combine pieces to grow stronger, outplay your opponent, and capture your way to victory.

name: 로보클린
description: "몬스터 소탕부터 완벽한 청소까지!" 메이드 로봇이 되어 난장판이 된 연구실을 정화하는 스타일리시 액션 게임입니다. 위협적인 몬스터를 격퇴하고 물리 기반의 독특한 상호작용으로 현장을 치워버리세요. BIC가 선택한 강렬한 타격감과 컨트롤러의 손맛을 지금 PC에서 느껴보세요!

name: UnderRed
description: UnderRed is a fast-paced first-person shooter featuring free-for-all combat for up to 8 players online. Switch between pistols, rifles, and snipers, use melee strikes, and fight to land the first kill. Play solo against AI or battle friends through Steam P2P networking.

name: Pro Eleven
description: PRO ELEVEN is an online football game supporting full 11v11 matches. Train your player, build your team, and enjoy real-time football together.

name: Projet Brouillon
description: Experience an adventure where every discovery shapes your identity, as you journey along the boundary between reality and imagination in this 3D platformer.

name: I Wanna Touch
description: I Wanna Touch is a pixel-art platformer where you play as a gliding bunny carried by a strange wind. Master the airflow, collect carrots, dodge deadly traps, and fly toward your beloved. Danger is everywhere—can you survive the journey?

name: Mobile Dungeon
description: From the universe of Shakes & Fidget, the NEW Team Battle RPG dungeon crawler!

name: 蟲
description: “你醒啦？快起来，一起迎接新世纪！” 显示屏上闪烁的异常痕迹，突然出现在桌面又突然变异死亡的“小虫子”，主动弹出的错误日志，梦回千禧年的网站，探求千年虫的真相……

name: Pompadour Panic: Bunny Bravo vs Slick McStoat
description: Help the pompadour donning Bunny Bravo in his quest to make pomade for his date. In this light hearted cute and casual Action RPG. Partake in a variety of minigames in order to complete the goal of making pomade while keeping an eye out for the sneaky Slick McStoat from taking your pomades.

name: Alstan
description: Alstan is a 3rd-person action-adventure game set in the merciless deserts of Idnan, inspired by Amazigh and Tuareg cultures. You play as Alstan, a warrior cursed by the Mark of the Desert, a power that allows him to control sand but slowly turns him into one of the very Djinns he hunts.

name: Lost Children of the Mansion
description: Explore a dark mansion that constantly shifts like a maze. Rescue the trapped children hidden behind locked doors. Avoid the roaming enemies and find your way out.

name: Stellifier: The Comeback
description: Stellifier: The Comeback - an otome TYPING game inspired by older idols, sequel to the original Stellifier An idol drama game about an older group making a comeback from retirement, featuring a GxB/BxB/non-binary romance!

name: Dreams Stories Online
description: Dreams Stories Online is an indie MMORPG where you return from death 🕯️ not as someone who has already triumphed, but as someone who still dreams. Walk through a persistent, wounded, and hostile world, guided by the hope of a great restoration.

name: Animal Gaze on-XR
description: Animal Gaze is a digital and VR-friendly speculative archive exhibition based on the original story of the non-virtual exhibition of the same name held in Istanbul, Türkiye, in 2023.

name: Spirit-Sealing Tome
developer: 深圳市江湖游科技有限公司
description: "Spirit-Sealing Tome" is an immortal-themed RPG with meticulously crafted scenes that immerse you in a fantastical realm. Experience the thrill of sword flight and dazzling skill moves, fully embracing the charm of the immortal world. Steam gift code: VIPSteam
publisher: 辰炎翎网络科技（上海）有限公司

name: CliveWareGOLD
description: A standalone lore drop from the world of Clive is a Good Guy - free, weird, and packed with unstable secrets.

name: Haimaskià
description: Haimaskià is an vampire-themed action/stealth game where you play as Lucie, an assassin trying to survive in the shadowy underworld.

name: The Raid of Brunswick
description: A first-person simulation where players take on the roles of a Lancaster bomber crew during a single World War II bombing raid over Brunswick.

name: Precision
description: Precision is a 2D platform shooter with circa 1980-style sound and graphics. Shoot balls at the targets and, when all have been hit, make your way to the goal - but do so without exceeding the time limit and the maximum number of balls.

name: Dog's Walts
description: This dog is a little goofy, but the hammer is dead serious. Play as a cute and clueless dog and smash soldiers off the stage to score points. Featuring 3D visuals with 2D-style controls, it’s easy to play, chaotic, and hard to stop. Just one more run!

name: Metal Goose
description: Play as the MG-1 super soldier in this gritty and wacky first-person retro shooter, and mow down hordes of robotic birds in an endless global war between the Chickens and Geese.

name: EXODUS
description: Defend Earth from the waves of alien invaders in this action-packed top-down shooter!

name: Specter Hideout
description: Specter Hideout is a top-down, asymmetrical multiplayer experience for 2 to 5 players. It pits a team of Hunters against one invisible Specter. Whether you are hunting the specter or "haunting the living", every match is a game of cat-and-mouse where one wrong move means the end.

name: Song of Decay
description: Journey as Orpheus in this 2D top-down RPG: play your lyre, battle dark forces, and strive to reunite with Eurydice.

name: Slime Wars
description: 2D Strategy game.

name: Green Light
description: A forgotten mining town. Peaceful by day, mysterious by night. Enter the dream and unravel the town’s secrets.

name: Chibi Planet
description: Experience an adorable life in an MMORPG world. where you can play however you like! Create your own character and dream home, choose your career, team up with friends to launch a company, adventures with your adorable pet. Whether you’re battling or simply enjoying a chill lifestyle in your style!

name: John's Quest
description: You are John Appleby, game historian. Your shadow twin "Evil John" has been doing some evil business and is causing genres to collide! Only you have the power to restore peace and save gaming...

name: Jujutsu Kaisen Phantom Parade
description: ◆The world of "TV Anime" and the story of "Jujutsu Kaisen" unique to the game◆ The anime story is recreated with new full voices. Additionally, the story is told from the perspectives of various characters, fully voiced.

name: Dungeon Armory
description: Build your own weapons, explore Dungeon and grow. Prove your skill by producing the best sword in the contest of the capital, and knock down the prophet monster. Medieval Fantasy Production RPG with blacksmith simulation and action dungeon exploration.

name: Cards and Castles Ultimate
description: Collectible cards meets tactical strategy! Build decks, uncover crazy combos, and battle friends and rivals in TACTICAL CARD-BOARD COMBAT. Bring your cards to life and dominate the grid!

name: Ready, Set, Block!
description: "Ready, Set, Block!" is a fast-paced PvP board game where players race to reach the opposite side first. Place blocks to slow opponents, use character abilities and items to outwit rivals, and plan your moves carefully in this turn-based, tactical race. Play locally, online, or vs AI.

name: KamiKaZe
description: KamiKaZe is a controller-only multiplayer shooter where it's every player for themselves—no teams, just pure free-for-all action! Each player needs their own controller: whether it’s a 1v1, a three-player showdown, or a full four-player brawl.Grab your controllers and prove who’s the best!

name: Punishing: Gray Raven
description: As the commandant of the Gray Raven squad, you must assemble the most powerful Construct soldiers ever created and lead them into battle. Uncover the dark truths behind the Punishing Virus, push back the Corrupted, and reclaim Earth in this stylish, high-octane action RPG.

name: Super Waifu Tsunami
description: The anime waifu platform-fighter you never knew you needed!

name: Somnivium
description: "Let's find the answer to why we got trapped in the game. Build a deck that fits you, find new cards that suit your style, and fuse your cards together! (You might encounter some bugs while playing, sorry about that! We are just beginners who want to try making our own game.)"

name: Veg out Crew 2D Racer
description: Make your way through the many race cars, wepons and tracks to claim victory among the greatest veg out crew racers there is. A top down racer with it's own blend of personality and style. Choose your racer, choose your weapon, buckle up and prepare to race through the Veg out World.

name: Warrior Duels
description: Warrior Duels is an immersive online trading card game pitting legendary warriors from distinct historical factions against each other in a duel of skill, strength, and strategy.  Choose from preconstructed decks or build your own, play against opponents from around the world, or challenge the AI.

name: Autotag
description: Battle your friends in this cozy cartoon multiplayer car shooter! Get unique physics based weapons to destroy your friends and customise your car to suit your style! Get tagging and bagging them kills today!

name: Grove
description: Nurture a small forest under siege by lumberjacks in this cozy tower defense game. Plant and upgrade trees with unique abilities to protect your grove, customize and decorate your forest, and unwind with the soothing escape of building a natural haven from a single sapling.

name: DPS IDLE 2
description: The long awaited sequel to DPS Idle. Collect cards, upgrade cards, defeat monsters, join guilds and recruit heroes. DPS IDLE 2!

name: SHRAPNEL
description: Shrapnel is a 4v4 objective FPS. Operators clash in a storm-ravaged impact zone to control Sigma—a volatile resource capable of reshaping humanity’s future.

name: KritterRun
description: Race and learn Japanese! KritterRun is a multiplayer racing game where you master vocabulary through fast-paced binary gates—left for correct, right for wrong. Fall Guys meets language learning. No flashcards, no punishment, just fun.

name: Mnemosyne's Cube
description: My name is left behind these white walls. In its place, I am left with dozens of questions. I wander aimlessly, though she seems to guide me. I do not feel safe. Twenty-four hours... and everything will fall into place.

name: Räv Kafé
description: Räv Kafé is a 2D action platformer where you wander around in the world and in order to survive you need to find materials and food. Explore the open world.

name: The Garden of Youth
description: "The Graden of Youth"is a visual light novel with a focus on youthful love. The story mainly tells of a group of teenagers and girls suffering from mental illness -" AS "- who are involved in a" box court "experiment.

name: 合击传奇
description: 全新传奇《合击传奇》，耗时两年精心雕琢，倾尽心血打造诚意巨献！以原创剧情为灵魂的基础上，它保留了传奇的核心玩法（打怪、升级、爆装备、攻沙巴克）超级大陆为舞台🌏，秉持“不肝不氪”的友好理念🥰，同时增加了魂器、专属装备、不同职业的多种流派等独具特色的新内容，让游戏体验既怀旧又新奇 There are pigs of various levels. Players can breed different pigs to obtain a pig of a higher level or the same level.

name: Tomoshibi no Yoru
description: A cooperative puzzle adventure where a small flame and a girl journey together through the night. Guided by light, they brave wind and rain to reach the shrine.

name: Solitaire Holiday : Card Games
description: Relax and unwind with Solitaire Holiday, a beautifully designed 2D card game featuring classic solitaire gameplay, smooth controls, and satisfying animations. Complete levels, sharpen your strategy, and enjoy a cozy, casual card experience anytime.

name: Lint
description: Lint is a minimalist idle game where lint builds up the longer you stay. Collect it, upgrade your production, and turn tiny dust balls into an unstoppable fluff empire.

name: ASTRA: Knights of Veda
drm_notes:
ACE
None machine activataion limit machine activation limit
description: ASTRA: Knights of Veda is a visually stunning, story-rich, 2D RPG. A dark plague besets the world of Planis, perptrated through a dark ritual performed by the Mad King. You, and the other Knights of Veda, are the only ones who can bring normality back to the world.

name: Idle Guy: Life Simulator games
description: Life Business empire rich game. Boss millionaire idle games. Idle office tycoon

name: Sexy Airlines EVO
description: Sexy Airlines is an idle-clicker dating game, that puts you in charge of an airlines company. Your goal is to use your business to hire flight attendants and get intimate with them. The more successful your business, the greater your ability to progress with the girls and make them fall for you.

name: 4Spicchi
description: The 4Spicchi pizzeria is under attack by terrifying food-monsters, and only Margherita can stop them. How? Using their ingredients... and a little bit of science!

name: The Black Whale
description: The factory chip began to malfunction. Your horrible headaches don’t bother anyone in this dystopian world. “Black Whale”, the attractive white powder, is the only thing that can stop the pain. And show you the life without the horrors of harsh reality.

name: Find my key
description: This is a maze game in which players must search for crucial items in darkness, in order to complete the game,these items are keys. There are four distinct difficulty levels, with each higher level demanding the discovery of more keys and presenting increasingly intricate pathways.

name: Sato Killing Time Chat.exe
description: It was supposed to be just a harmless chat to kill time with a stranger named Mina. But from the other side of the browser, the boundary between your reality and the internet is slowly being eroded. This is a desktop-invasion chat horror.

name: GBWEngine
description: Welcome to the world of GBWEngine, where you can enjoy enjoyable exploration in semi open or sandbox levels, using different weapons and equipment to engage in thrilling battles with various monsters.

name: Deckbuilder Fantasy
description: Embark on a thrilling deckbuilding adventure, fighting your way to the final boss on a journey that's different every time.

name: Ferret Quest
description: Ferret Quest is a charming hand-drawn action game where a brave little ferret hurls acorns at masked woodland foes. Battle through challenging levels, uncover the mystery behind the masks, and take on a climactic boss fight in this adorable forest adventure!

name: Pest'Off
description: Pest'Off is a student made First-Person Shooter. Mutants are infesting the city and you’re the one paid to clean it up. Play as a Pest’Off employee, take extermination contracts, wipe out aggressive mutants, earn cash, and upgrade your gear. Clock in, exterminate, get paid.

name: Guinea Pig Temple
description: You are the hero, and it’s time to save your guinea pig friends! Eat food! Squeak! Popcorn! Gather all types of food and friends for a fun temple party. When you've gathered enough friends and resources, the temple's final portal opens for you to join the grand celebration!

name: Bird Watching Simulator
description: An avid bird watching simulator with realistic watching mechanics. Grab your binoculars and build your attention span, Bird Watching Simulator is an unbelievably relaxing and interactive game that draws you so close to nature, it feels like you're apart of it.

name: Smile More
description: A short medical simulation horror game with multiple endings where the imperfect are made HAPPY. Perform tasks and operations on sedated patients to fix their defects before submitting your files to the Ministry of Happiness & Peace!

name: Escape From SanGuo
description: 东汉末年，群雄割据，民不聊生——但对你来说，风浪越大，鱼越贵！ 欢迎来到 《我在三国开黑店》：一款融合经营模拟、轻度搜打撤与角色养成的三国题材动作冒险游戏。在这里，你不是将军，不是谋士，而是一位深谙“黑店之道”的少东家：平日里高价卖货、训练手下、笼络名将；深夜悄悄出城、搜刮物资、抢夺宝藏！

name: VampireBlaze
description: This is a classic platformer.Fight through over 10 stages—or take an alternate route—as you make your way to the demon lord.It offers a challenging, retro-style action experience focused on precise controls and skill-based gameplay.

name: Mystologia: The Witch & The Noisy Forest
description: Survive waves of relentless bullets and defeat your enemies. Can you resolve this incident in peace and find the colleague you’ve been searching for?

name: Hidden Rabbit
description: Explore the captivating hand-drawn artwork in unique settings, and in a theme park filled with rabbits, attempt to locate all 55 adorable rabbits hidden throughout the game. Can you find them all?

name: Focus Knight: Productivity RPG
description: Focus Knight is a relaxing focus and productivity RPG. Set a timer, stay focused, and watch your hero automatically explore dungeons, fight enemies, and grow stronger. The longer you focus, the greater the rewards.

name: Dam Rush XD
description: A fast-paced 2D action platformer where you play as a determined beaver fighting off enemies, dodging hazards, and surviving the wild. Grab you wood to complete your dam and get to the next level!

name: BitSlaps
description: BitSlaps is a chaotic, interactive multiplayer game where streamers become gladiators and viewers pull the strings. Compete in outrageous challenges, survive sabotage, and rage your way through custom maps built for laughs, skill, and pure madness.

name: Threadline
description: A clean, rhythm‑infused precision runner where you weave through shifting obstacles with focus and flow. Threadline rewards instinct, timing, and mastery, delivering short, intense runs that pull you into a calm, satisfying state of momentum.

name: Mini UP
description: Mini UP is a free parkour game where every second counts. Optimize your movements, perfect your precision, and achieve faster and faster times.

name: Keg & Quest
description: Keg & Quest is a free-to-play idle RPG with online multiplayer. Build your hero, join a guild, compete in PvP, and take part in world boss events where strategy and progression matter more than reflexes.

name: Whispers of the Seasons
description: You have been marked by a monster to be its next prey. Defend your cabin against the beast across the four seasons, listening out for its attacks to stop it before it gets inside. Complete tasks throughout the night in an effort to free yourself from its curse and return to a normal life.

name: Run Shiba Run!
description: Goma the dog has escaped from their owner’s leash and is running around the park without restraint to eat as many biscuits as they can. Help them fill their stomach before time runs out or choose to explore the park on your terms.

name: GOAT FPS
description: An old school first-person shooter inspired by the classics from the 90s. You know the ones! You'll have to explore every corner to find resources that will help you survive. If you've got a keen eye you might even find a secret or two.

name: Biotype
description: Test the limits of bio-mechanical clone Model 137 a.k.a BIOTYPE in this free, endless bullet hell. Master the Biotype's patented tri-laser and push as far as you can. Will BIOTYPE prove it can make a difference in the fight against the enemy in the real world?

name: Setuna:Legend of Hamburger 2
description: All motions, all frames cancelable. The second installment of the ultra-free 3D action-adventure [SETUNA]. Challenge the limits of your skills with a fully professional-grade input system!

name: THE CUBE, SAVE US
description: A post-apocalyptic extraction action game built around brutal, close-quarters combat. Step through the Cube Gate and discover ever-shifting worlds filled with strange landscapes and terrifying enemies. Escape the Cube by fighting your way through twisted mutants and Raiders you once called allies.

name: Gunja Tteokbokki
description: Orders pouring in, broth bubbling over, and the daily pressure of balancing the books! Manage your ingredients, cook tteokbokki to perfection, and run your very own shop in this culinary tycoon simulation game.

name: Void of Lilly
description: Void of Lilly is an adventure in the world of the near future with JRPG elements and Bullet Hell battles! Help Ann to find her sister and uncover secrets of this world... Void of Lilly is coming on Steam for free!

name: Soul Requiem
description: Soul Requiem is a 2D action roguelite blending flashy spear combat with deep progression. Face your kin turned into divine vessels and stand against the sacred horrors erupting from their flesh. Slay your enemies to liberate your mother’s soul trapped within.

name: ACE:Alice Card Episode
description: Caution! Do not make any plans before playing this game. This game is so addctive that makes The new brand deck-building rogue-like card battle A.C.E is here!

name: Off The Grid
description: Welcome to Off The Grid, the next-gen free to play Battle Royale from visionary director Neill Blomkamp. Set in a near-future world where contestants are cybernetically augmented and dropped into televised bloodsport. Death is temporary, but fame is forever.

name: The Bonerooms
description: The Bonerooms is a goofy horror-themed multiplayer game about surviving in a living maze. What will be your downfall? The spooky inhabitants of the maze, or your fellow players?

name: Mini Warrior Defense
description: Lead your warriors on an epic adventure to defend your kingdom from invaders - in this action tower defense game, you can use various defense towers, levels, heroes, and many good things to help you destroy enemies!

name: PAGUI-Battle
description: PAGUI Battle is an asymmetrical multiplayer battle game set in the rich world of Taiwanese folklore. One player takes on the role of the Malevolent , while three players form the Exorcists team.

name: Purr Bricks
description: Smash through over 100 brick-packed levels in this fast-paced arcade brick breaker! Collect wild powerups, dodge chaotic curses, and build up FURY to unleash devastating board-clearing strikes. Easy to play, hard to master, and packed with mayhem.

name: Food Drive: Race against Hunger
description: Food Drive: Race against Hunger is a fun driving adventure into food bank awareness. By collecting food and making timely deliveries you can work your way through 3 levels of driving, delivery, and fun.

name: 6 Floors
description: You find yourself in a strange place and the only way out is within. Navigate liminal corridors and rooms filled with psychological terrors as you traverse all six floors of this mysterious place in order to save your soul.

name: Wandering Okali
description: Discover magical creatures while exploring a fantasy world in this whimsical, art-filled visual novel!

name: Target Menace : The Awakening
description: You woke up on a island full of spiders...Uncover, Fight, Explore in the target menace universe

name: Mall Ryders
description: Mall Ryders is a high-energy arcade adventure where you blaze through a chaotic mall as unforgettable characters, mastering movement, smashing obstacles, and embracing playful destruction. Race, drift, and explore in fast-paced mayhem with quirky style and unmatched momentum.

name: Al'ulA
description: Al’ulA is a first-person non-euclidean puzzle game set in a strange fractal dimension inspired by medieval Morocco. You will use an alien artefact to solve puzzles while guided by a strange alien entity.

name: Twenty One
description: You wake up in a velvet-draped casino that seems suspended in a void, run by faceless dealers and watched by an unseen Host. You're told you owe a "debt of existence" and must earn your right to live another day by beating the Quota. You have 5 rounds to meet the quota, or… you're out. Permanently.

name: NULL: INITIATIVE
description: Shoot and slash your way through Enemies and Levels while upgrading, in Endless Mode and the Campaign in this fast-paced Hack 'n' Slash. You can even face these challenging levels while playing up to 64 players online!

name: INNBC STARFIGHTER
description: A free-to-play 90s-style bullet-hell shooter with high-res graphics, unlocked 60+ FPS, single-player campaign, and online co-op multiplayer!

name: OMVROS
description: Experience the deep fusion of rhythm and visuals in this innovative fixed-track rhythm game. Through meticulously designed charts and performance effects, every track presents a unique sensory world for you to explore.

name: Riichi City × Date A LiveⅤ
description: Riichi City is a competitive urban-style Anime mahjong game, featuring beginner-friendly mahjong tutorials, Ranked Matches and tournaments crowded with masters! Spice up the experience with our ACG characters voiced by famous CVs, and attractive items and decorations! Set off for Riichi City now!

name: PAN!
description: A 2D casual puzzle game set in the beautiful paradise of Arcadia. Help Echo find her way back home! Short game that everyone could enjoy! Use the mouse to solve the card game: slide and match the cards to complete the story! A simple puzzle game perfect for quick breaks!

name: Life is Strange - Episode 1
description: Episode 1 now FREE! Life is Strange is an award-winning and critically acclaimed episodic adventure game that allows the player to rewind time and affect the past, present and future.

name: Ocean
description: Welcome to Ocean, the world's first AI-powered collectible card game! Here, you'll create your own unique AI cards. Every interaction and adventure will forge a special, one-of-a-kind relationship between you. All cards are freely tradable; build your own card world!

name: Pal Pachinko
description: Your job is boring. Pal Pachinko isn't. Park this idle game in the corner of your screen and watch your balls drop along with your productivity. It's the most efficient way to waste your time. Why focus on one thing when you can fail at two? It's small enough that your boss won't notice (probably).

name: Silly Linguine Cat Simulator Deluxe Online
description: Silly Linguine Cat Simulator Deluxe Online is a clicker game where progression is replaced with gambling, where the goal is simply to collect the rarest silly linguine cats.

name: Souper Bloody
description: Slaughter the vegetables that accidentally summoned your demonic self in this devilishly tasty action-packed roguelite hack-and-slash! Upgrade your attacks and gain new spicy powers every run while exploring the depths of the Underlasagne.

name: Winmon: Prologue
description: Feed your cute little monsters right on your desktop! And once full, it's time to work! From sowing seeds, watering plants, providing light to mining ores and chopping trees. Resources don't come on their own and food isn't bought with air. Everyone will need to work.

name: EXOTERRA: A Space Journey
description: EXOTERRA: A Space Journey is a first-person science fiction puzzle game set aboard a stranded ship in the vast, dark expanse of outer space. Explore the HOPE-03 and uncover the mysteries it holds as you solve fully interactive escape-room-style chambers powered by a physics-based system.

name: GLOCKTOPUS
description: Glocktopus is a free-to-play 3D comedy puzzle game where you control an armed octopus, using your trusty sidearm, aquatic gadgets, and clever environmental interactions to overcome comedic challenges and escape the aquarium in pursuit of the local mafia’s Golden Gun.

name: Missing Texture
description: Missing Texture is a psychological horror experience told in chapters. Download the free Launcher and access all main chapters at no cost. The full story expands through additional games.

name: NEOTAG LEAGUE
description: Team up and beat your opponents in NEOTAG LEAGUE, the futuristic sport where sci-fi parkour robots fight for the ball to score points! Jump, roll, wall run, grapple, dodge and attack in this team-based multiplayer game.

name: HONOR 2
description: Play as "Chris" as you explore a fleshed-out world, rich in personalities, Level grind with the Turn-Based Battle system as you unlock new Special attacks, and discover secret paths, enemies, and bosses along the way! Features beautiful artwork, music, and voice talent!

name: 街灯 -machinohi-
description: Do you remember? Those "rules" we made for the walk home. In the eighth grade, the rule I set for myself was: "I can only stay in the dark for five seconds." A silent Japanese night. You must reach the next pool of light before the five seconds are up. Can you make it back home safely?

name: After the Stream Went Dark
description: Step into the world of Nyx, a VTuber whose online persona begins to blur with something far more unsettling. After the Stream Went Dark is a short psychological horror visual novel exploring identity, self-perception, and the fragile boundary between performance and reality.

name: Duality Shift
description: Duality Shift is a Singleplayer First Person Racing-Platformer: Run, Jump, perform Parkour moves and completely alter the reality that is around you on your way to the top of the online leaderboards and uncover the secrets of this world along the way.

name: Resort Island Simulator: Prologue
description: A world filled with tricksters, pirates, zealots, and treasures. An ocean full of danger and prize. Face dilemmas and encounters. Manage a resort in this wild world and build a thriving business. An Explorer, a Survivor a Resorter or a Trader? Forge your own path to wealth. Make Resort Prosper!

name: Witch Switched
description: A "man" is transformed into a woman by a vengeful witch and realizes she likes it better this way.

name: The Red Pearls Of Borneo
description: A detective noir puzzle deduction game. Explore a non-linear timeline as a clairvoyant investigator in 1941 Borneo. Jump between time and locations to uncover motives and discover what truly happened in the Goodwill tobacco plantation that fateful night on the eve of the WW2 Japanese invasion.

name: Loop Tower: Prologue
